name: Tina Smith
subject: Friend, checking in
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
I'm here in the Senate fighting to stop Brett Kavanaugh.

| Friend, I'm here in the Senate fighting to stop Brett Kavanaugh and stop Republicans from rolling back even more of your rights, but my team just told me we're falling behind our goals during our most important week yet. Our final FEC quarterly fundraising deadline of the campaign is in just 3 days, and we still need to raise $38,829.20 to hit our grassroots goal. **Can I count on you to chip in $10 today to help us finish this final week strong before our deadline Sunday night? Just click here:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-september](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-september?refcode=rtw_20180927PM_em&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto")** We're expecting huge amounts of special interest money to target our campaign in October, and so we need to hit our September fundraising goal to make sure we're prepared. That means we need every member of this team to step up and chip in what they can right now. **We 're not counting on millionaires or big special interests to hit this goal -- just grassroots donors. Here's the link to give: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-september](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-september?refcode=rtw_20180927PM_em&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto")** Counting on you,
Tina
---

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4d4df/c1f7015/6cdbfd16/114152d2/661584722/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota

name: David Ortiz
subject: tonight's debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Gina Raimondo
body:
|
---
[ ](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a008/5e076a9e/54f6eba4/14425ccc/1226695132/VEsH/ "http://ginaraimondo.com")

| | Friend -- I hope you tuned into the Rhode Island Gubernatorial debate earlier this evening. **Governor Raimondo showed she is bringing the change Rhode Islanders need and that Mayor Fung and Rep. Trillo promise to take Rhode Island backwards.** **Under her leadership, the economy is stronger than it 's been in decades and no one else running has the backbone to stand up to Donald Trump.** Rhode Island's unemployment is the lowest in nearly 20 years, we've created over 15,000 jobs and a record number of Rhode Islanders are graduating high school and enrolling in college. **Gina Raimondo deserves four more years to finish the job, but she needs your help to get it done:[click here and volunteer now!](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a008/5e076a9e/54f6eba4/14425ccf/1226695132/VEsE/ "https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/signup/volunteer")** Meanwhile, Allan Fung has been Mayor more than twice as long as Gina Raimondo has been Governor. What's his record? His city is officially in financial distress. In his 10 years as Mayor, he raised property taxes five times, Cranston's fire and police pension system is just 24% funded, and he underfunded the schools by millions. Cranston's schools are falling apart, and the Cranston car tax is one of the state's highest. If elected, Mayor Fung will throw our economy into reverse. **[Will you stand up for Rhode Island's future and commit to volunteer now?](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a008/5e076a9e/54f6eba4/14425ccf/1226695132/VEsF/ "https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/signup/volunteer")** Thank you for your support. David Ortiz
Deputy Campaign Manager
---
|
---
[](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a008/5e076a9e/54f6eba4/14425cce/1226695132/VEsC/ "https://www.facebook.com/gina.raimondo/") [](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a008/5e076a9e/54f6eba4/14425cc1/1226695132/VEsD/ "http://twitter.com/ginaraimondo") [](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a008/5e076a9e/54f6eba4/14425cc0/1226695132/VEsA/ "http://instagram.com/ginaraimondo")

Friends of Gina Raimondo
PO Box 40794
Providence, RI 02940

This email is not intended for any Rhode Island state government employees. If you are a Rhode Island state government employee, please disregard and let us know so we can unsubscribe you from future emails. Per Rhode Island State Law, individuals may contribute a maximum of $1,000 per year. Business and corporate checks are prohibited.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, click below to unsubscribe.

[Unsubscribe](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a008/5e076a9e/54f6eba4/14425cc3/1226695132/VEsB/ "https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/unsubscribe")

| | [Donate Now](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a008/5e076a9e/54f6eba4/14425cc2/1226695132/VEsO/ "http://ginaraimondo.com/donate")

name: Mark Warner
subject: Watch the polls (but also don't)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
It was just four years ago, in 2014, when my race for Senate looked like a sure bet -- and turned out to be anything but. ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek, polls are always close in Virginia. They just are.

Last year, we saw that work in our favor when Democrats at the state level won in districts that had long been written off.

**But it was just four years ago, in 2014, when my race for Senate looked like a sure bet -- and turned out to be anything but. What looked like a gigantic lead up until Election Day turned into a nail biter the night of.**

[Will you chip in to make sure Tim shows strength when this quarter's numbers get revealed on October 1st? He has to fill a $44,600 gap to reach his goal by Sunday.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1056/3e0906/719e6ff2/3e367567/3389638608/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180927_2_FR_MRW_warner-surrogate-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Will+you+chip+in+to+make+sure+Tim+shows+&utm_campaign=20180927_2_FR_MRW_warner-surrogate-LDND&source=20180927_2_FR_MRW_warner-surrogate-LDND")

Listen, polls just don't tell the whole story. Whether they show Tim up by double digits, or Corey Stewart inching much closer, we're not going to let any poll numbers define us. We'll stay focused on building the best program for Virginia, and giving our great House candidates the boost they need to come out on top in their races too.

And most importantly: We're not going to take anything for granted. We're three days away from the biggest deadline of the election, and soon it'll be time to turn out some voters. So it's all hands on deck now, Derek.

**Can you help me push Tim over the edge of his goal? If most of you reading this chip in $5, we can knock this goal out of the park in the next three days:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1056/3e0906/719e6ff2/3e367566/3389638608/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20180927_2_FR_MRW_warner-surrogate-LDND&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+5&utm_campaign=20180927_2_FR_MRW_warner-surrogate-LDND&source=20180927_2_FR_MRW_warner-surrogate-LDND")

clean_body: It was just four years ago, in 2014, when my race for Senate looked like a sure bet -- and turned out to be anything but. ------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek, polls are always close in Virginia. They just are. Last year, we saw that work in our favor when Democrats at the state level won in districts that had long been written off. But it was just four years ago, in 2014, when my race for Senate looked like a sure bet -- and turned out to be anything but. What looked like a gigantic lead up until Election Day turned into a nail biter the night of. "" Listen, polls just don't tell the whole story. Whether they show Tim up by double digits, or Corey Stewart inching much closer, we're not going to let any poll numbers define us. We'll stay focused on building the best program for Virginia, and giving our great House candidates the boost they need to come out on top in their races too. And most importantly: We're not going to take anything for granted. We're three days away from the biggest deadline of the election, and soon it'll be time to turn out some voters. So it's all hands on deck now, Derek. Can you help me push Tim over the edge of his goal? If most of you reading this chip in $5, we can knock this goal out of the park in the next three days: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" Thanks, team. Senator Mark Warner "" * | "" "" ""

name: Tom O'Halleran
subject: FW: my friend Tom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
I hope you can take a moment to read former Congressman Barber's kind note.
Friends, I hope you can take a moment to read former Congressman Barber's kind note below. I have known Ron for years -- from when I served in the state legislature. Over his career he has been an upstanding advocate for Arizona families and I am honored to have his support in my re-election race. He also knows what it's like to be running in a tight race where every single vote will make a difference. [**It would mean a lot if you joined Ron in supporting my campaign with a donation before this critical deadline.** ](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.27_b2_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")My fundraising numbers will go public after the books close on the third quarter, and we only have three short days until Sunday at midnight. I promise to keep up the fight for Arizona's working families -- but I am truly [**depending on your support**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.27_b2_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") to keep this district blue. Yours, Tom \-----forwarded message---- From: Ron Barber Subject: my friend Tom Friend, _Arizonans are fortunate to have a fighter like Tom O 'Halleran serving them in Congress._ When Tom served in Arizona's state legislature, I watched him fight for all-day kindergarten and work to reform child protective services. And since his election to Congress, I've watched Tom do right for Arizona's working families in Washington, standing up for their health care and serving his district's rural and urban communities with distinction. But Tom needs [**our support today**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.27_b2_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") so he can continue looking out for Arizona families in Congress. He is up for re-election in November and his swing district is very competitive. [**Friend, will you make a donation to Tom 's campaign today, before his next fundraising deadline on Sunday?**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.27_b2_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Independent, pragmatic voices like Tom are too rare in Washington, friend. Tom doesn't get pushed around by party politics; he does what's right for families in his district, and he'll work with anyone to do it. It's one of the things I most admire about him -- **and it 's why it's critical that Tom not lose re-election to an extreme partisan who would be a rubber-stamp for the far-right.** I'm confident that Arizona voters will re-elect Tom in November if he can share his record of accomplishments with them. [**So, please consider donating to Tom 's campaign before his deadline, if you can.**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.27_b2_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Thank you, Ron Barber _Former Congressman, Arizona 's 2nd District_ | ****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.27_b2_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****
---

**_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq32018?refcode=footer-bio&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=").**_**
** **
** **
** **
** **

Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
---

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can [_click here_](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633eea/1a8421e1/19a3aa0b0/4924f4df/2887654602/VEsP/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/s/less-emails").

Your grassroots support is critical to helping Tom become a strong voice for all Arizonians. If you'd still like to unsubscribe from our emails, [_click here_](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633eea/1a8421e1/19a3aa0b0/4924f4c0/2887654602/VEsHBQ/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/unsubscribe"). If you'd like to donate to our campaign, please [_click here_](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633eea/1a8421e1/19a3aa0b0/4924f4c1/2887654602/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleran?refcode=email_footer&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000"). Thanks for having Tom's back!

name: Leah Vukmir
subject: disgusting display...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leah for Senate
body:
I'm sorry to email you so late tonight, but it can't wait. Did you see that disgusting display in the Swamp today? The circus that Democrats have.....

Friend -

I'm sorry to email you so late tonight, but it can't wait.

Did you see that disgusting display in the Swamp today? The circus that Democrats have turned Judge Kavanaugh's confirmation into is shameful.

Tomorrow morning at 9:30, the Senate Judiciary Committee is going to vote on whether to confirm Judge Kavanaugh, and the left will stop at nothing to defeat him.

I, for one, will not sit idly by while that happens.

That's why I'm asking you to join me in sending Tammy Baldwin a message: Judge Kavanaugh should be confirmed.

If you agree, then I'm asking you to add your name to my petition immediately:** [https://leahvukmir.com/support-judge-kavanaugh/](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e75c6af4e56b480e80c3955c53f2fb31&_e=DAm6NRSD6B1LWk5q7U95o0wtxCraOZ_-yfr6v2s2dskZ0FviVfeV4kECnAOQ-pwU7uwedPytbBIFqORszAZ3vSFIZkkRazPFYib0R0pPqPenDDlMO2DhhzmM3ZwXPwe_OJ0VYzMD-04lJxQAPg0UQ0C7jhVuNK0pIcLLs6RC2mxcnlL-sSXy8W5zaW1N3hRXxNSp02oXRcrxaLAHEVKnW18N9JidwEuikRqkAeH9d1WxbfYqWjVlVo7MvidDUDlCKbGT_PVfWoiXHTJZGy--7iSFx3e55LhQHAowk7lYJC9kyqJm6K1hh-mjpvl6cIaguJyWQXnvzaUUNF_miTnhVuOH-NOcAnml-xwI1N3laTB7pKTWFrB7iK7fhElXl95WIrKauRw5KbkJux4lKlPto3fzl5CyCMhKH9PUo-VV7wNhkBCmyie-nCZc6XjMzM3l)**

Leah

clean_body: I'm sorry to email you so late tonight, but it can't wait. Did you see that disgusting display in the Swamp today? The circus that Democrats have..... Friend - I'm sorry to email you so late tonight, but it can't wait. Did you see that disgusting display in the Swamp today? The circus that Democrats have turned Judge Kavanaugh's confirmation into is shameful. Tomorrow morning at 9:30, the Senate Judiciary Committee is going to vote on whether to confirm Judge Kavanaugh, and the left will stop at nothing to defeat him. I, for one, will not sit idly by while that happens. That's why I'm asking you to join me in sending Tammy Baldwin a message: Judge Kavanaugh should be confirmed. If you agree, then I'm asking you to add your name to my petition immediately: But hurry, we have very little time. Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

name: Heidi =?UTF-8?Q?Sieck=2C=20=23VOTEPROCHOICE?=
subject: Noon Today: #StopKavanaugh protests at Senate offices across the country
body:
Activist - Dr. Christine Blasey Ford. Deborah Ramirez. Julie Swetnick. We believe them. We honor their courage. [**And we need to support them directly so they can speak their truths until Brett Kavanaugh is defeated, impeached, or indicted.**](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/BANbu/6/pH/r5cs/6fUAgR/v17haqDoTk/P/P) [**#VOTEPROCHOICE**](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/BANbu/s/t6/r5cs/6fUAgR/s9UKGiI9ZW/P/P) has been in D.C. all week, engaging in protest and nonviolent civil disobedience as part of a coalition led by the Center for Popular Democracy, Women's March, and Housing Works.

On Monday, I was arrested (again) outside of Senator Susan Collins' office; these elected women need to be reminded what's at stake for all women. Putting my own body on the line is the very least I can do. Here's what **you** can do today:

**1\. Today 12pm your time:**[**#StopKavanaugh protests at Senate offices across the country**](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/BANbu/v/po/r5cs/6fUAgR/6ZkffkvRXH/P/P)

Wear black, and bring signs (you can download some here), with messages such as "Believe Survivors" and "Stop Kavanaugh"-as well as, if you wish, handwritten letters, and pictures or photos of the people you're fighting for. When you arrive, look for other protesters so you can stand together. These are rapid-response gatherings, without much time to prepare - so they'll be scrappy, and that's OK. You should gather together to take photos of all of you standing with your signs and post them on social media with hashtags such as #StopKavanaugh and #BelieveSurvivors. Then go into the office to deliver the message to your senators that they have a responsibility to believe survivors, block this frenzied and offensive process, and stop Kavanaugh! [](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/BANbu/z/pM/r5cs/6fUAgR/6cWxQiCSm3/P/P) **2\. Call your Senators right now and tell them to vote NO on Kavanaugh.** [Call their DC and local offices directly.](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/BANbu/U/pg/r5cs/6fUAgR/vum6FdRzXv/P/P) **3\. Support the "[We Believe All the Women](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/BANbu/j/pH/r5cs/6fUAgR/6YwlMUprNr/P/P)" GoFundMe campaign**:

Every cent contributed to this GoFundMe goes directly to these heroic women so they can bravely speak their truths until they get justice. [](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/BANbu/5/pH/r5cs/6fUAgR/6YJkhW0do6/P/P) **4\. Watch live broadcasts of these and other protests by[act.tv](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/BANbu/r/pQ/r5cs/6fUAgR/zNEY5iIXo/P/P)** on **[Facebook](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/BANbu/Y/py/r5cs/6fUAgR/zDbMo0M96F/P/P)** , **[Twitter](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/BANbu/e/p2/r5cs/6fUAgR/v1dmBuAdQk/P/P)** , and **[Instagram](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/BANbu/3/p8/r5cs/6fUAgR/sWggNaJ1uc/P/P)**. [](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/BANbu/W/py/r5cs/6fUAgR/6yk9HNga4c/P/P) Thanks for all you do!

Heidi Sieck, #VOTEPROCHOICE
---

If you wish to stop receiving our emails or change your subscription options, please [Manage Your Subscription](https://demolinks.us/u/OTg0MjAvMC8xOTM2Njk2LzAvNDI0LzAvNmQyYjUzMWYyNDIzMDVlZjBlYTdjNDEyODZkMzM3MWUvMjQ5MzYwMDkz)
Democrats.com, Box 1452, New York, NY 10276

Peter, The last major fundraising deadline of the campaign is Sunday, and we want to show the nation our growing momentum. Here are the Top Ten reasons to **[donate today](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2369601/13148995/-2058851995?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODkwNWViZi0xNmMzLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0N2M4OWUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1fACUzWAG268pt6HrWYUGxHXKVLeN_aGySh__-oO5mM=).** **10. People Powered**
In November, 42 volunteers stepped up to collect signatures and get my name on the ballot, and **we now have over 800 volunteers** engaged in the campaign. My opponent is a mega-millionaire, [but you can’t buy people](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2369602/13148996/-803653937?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODkwNWViZi0xNmMzLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0N2M4OWUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1fACUzWAG268pt6HrWYUGxHXKVLeN_aGySh__-oO5mM=&v=2ClDJoBoFtQ)! **9. Common Decency** My opponent backed the Muslim Ban, the Border Wall, and Family Separation, along with unequal pay for women and the appointment of Brett Kavanaugh. As your congressman, **I will fight to keep families together and end the reign of hatred, abuse and bigotry** coming from the Republican Administration. [**Donate today to restore common decency to our government.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2369603/13148997/-2058851995?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODkwNWViZi0xNmMzLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0N2M4OWUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1fACUzWAG268pt6HrWYUGxHXKVLeN_aGySh__-oO5mM=) **8. Equal Opportunity** We must repeal the 2017 tax cuts, which transferred over $1.5 trillion to the wealthiest Americans while setting up attacks on Social Security and Medicare. My opponent [pocketed millions of dollars](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2369604/13148998/-1774616698?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODkwNWViZi0xNmMzLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0N2M4OWUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1fACUzWAG268pt6HrWYUGxHXKVLeN_aGySh__-oO5mM=) with his vote for the Tax Scam. We must end this type of self-serving corruption. **Every American should have a fair shot at success.** **7. A Team Built to Win** We have invested in a field organization that has made tens of thousands of voter contacts, giving us the best possible chance to win. We have a field director, regional coordinators overseeing volunteer efforts in nine counties, two campus organizers, and multiple field organizers. **There is no tactic more effective than meeting a voter in person, and we are maximizing those conversations. [Donate today to keep our team working hard to turn out the vote!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2369605/13148999/-2058851995?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODkwNWViZi0xNmMzLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0N2M4OWUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1fACUzWAG268pt6HrWYUGxHXKVLeN_aGySh__-oO5mM=)** **6. Healthcare for All** **My top priority is to guarantee healthcare for every American.** 4.3 million Texans lack healthcare – over 100,000 in this District alone. Meanwhile, my opponent repeatedly voted to repeal the Affordable Care Act. Universal healthcare will strengthen our families and our economy. We can afford it, and it is the right thing to do. **5. Small Donor Funded** **I do not accept corporate PAC donations.** Meanwhile, my opponent accepts millions of dollars from private prison companies and other special interests. I am fortunate to be supported by many of you, and I’ve received thousands of individual donations under $200. [**Donate today to push back against corruption in politics!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2369606/13149000/-2058851995?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODkwNWViZi0xNmMzLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0N2M4OWUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1fACUzWAG268pt6HrWYUGxHXKVLeN_aGySh__-oO5mM=) **4. Open and Accessible** We have held town halls throughout the District over the last ten months, in places like Sealy, Brenham, Katy and Austin. Meanwhile, the incumbent has not held a town hall in ten years. **I am committed to listening to the people and being a true representative.** **3. Checks and Balances** Under this President, **Republicans have put party over country.** Congress has failed to stop the inhumane Family Separation policy, investigate the failures in hurricane response, or prosecute government corruption. When we win, Congress will fulfill its duty to keep the Administration accountable. [**Donate today to bring checks and balances back to our federal government!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2369607/13149001/-2058851995?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODkwNWViZi0xNmMzLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0N2M4OWUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1fACUzWAG268pt6HrWYUGxHXKVLeN_aGySh__-oO5mM=) **2. Understanding Local Needs** The Texas 10th is not one community, but many. In the eastern part of the District, the top issue is flood control: we need to invest in infrastructure to protect against the next big hurricane. In rural areas, we need to build hospitals and extend high-speed Internet. **By spending time in each region, we’ve learned what matters most to our constituents.**
**1. Commitment to Democracy** **More than anything else, democracy is on the ballot. **Because of gerrymandering and voter suppression, some have deemed this District “safe” for the Republicans. [But this District is not safe for us](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2369608/13149002/-803653937?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODkwNWViZi0xNmMzLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0N2M4OWUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1fACUzWAG268pt6HrWYUGxHXKVLeN_aGySh__-oO5mM=&v=2w3f5Ao2CYU). Whether it is healthcare, immigration, infrastructure, or the many other issues affecting our lives, we have not been heard. I am committed to representing every member of the Texas 10th, and to fighting to improve the lives of all! No donation is too small. **[If everyone on this list donates $20 today, we will exceed our goal!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2369609/13149003/-2058851995?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODkwNWViZi0xNmMzLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0N2M4OWUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1fACUzWAG268pt6HrWYUGxHXKVLeN_aGySh__-oO5mM=)** Thank you for all of your support. Together, we will win! With respect, Mike

clean_body: = Join our team! = or =. Peter, The last major fundraising deadline of the campaign is Sunday, and we want to show the nation our growing momentum. Here are the Top Ten reasons to =. 10. People Powered In November, 42 volunteers stepped up to collect signatures and get my name on the ballot, and we now have over 800 volunteers engaged in the campaign. My opponent is a mega-millionaire, ! 9. Common Decency My opponent backed the Muslim Ban, the Border Wall, and Family Separation, along with unequal pay for women and the appointment of Brett Kavanaugh. As your congressman, I will fight to keep families together and end the reign of hatred, abuse and bigotry coming from the Republican Administration. = 8. Equal Opportunity We must repeal the 2017 tax cuts, which transferred over $1.5 trillion to the wealthiest Americans while setting up attacks on Social Security and Medicare. My opponent = with his vote for the Tax Scam. We must end this type of self-serving corruption. Every American should have a fair shot at success. 7. A Team Built to Win We have invested in a field organization that has made tens of thousands of voter contacts, giving us the best possible chance to win. We have a field director, regional coordinators overseeing volunteer efforts in nine counties, two campus organizers, and multiple field organizers. There is no tactic more effective than meeting a voter in person, and we are maximizing those conversations. = 6. Healthcare for All My top priority is to guarantee healthcare for every American. 4.3 million Texans lack healthcare – over 100,000 in this District alone. Meanwhile, my opponent repeatedly voted to repeal the Affordable Care Act. Universal healthcare will strengthen our families and our economy. We can afford it, and it is the right thing to do. 5. Small Donor Funded I do not accept corporate PAC donations. Meanwhile, my opponent accepts millions of dollars from private prison companies and other special interests. I am fortunate to be supported by many of you, and I’ve received thousands of individual donations under $200. = 4. Open and Accessible We have held town halls throughout the District over the last ten months, in places like Sealy, Brenham, Katy and Austin. Meanwhile, the incumbent has not held a town hall in ten years. I am committed to listening to the people and being a true representative. 3. Checks and Balances Under this President, Republicans have put party over country. Congress has failed to stop the inhumane Family Separation policy, investigate the failures in hurricane response, or prosecute government corruption. When we win, Congress will fulfill its duty to keep the Administration accountable. = 2. Understanding Local Needs The Texas 10th is not one community, but many. In the eastern part of the District, the top issue is flood control: we need to invest in infrastructure to protect against the next big hurricane. In rural areas, we need to build hospitals and extend high-speed Internet. By spending time in each region, we’ve learned what matters most to our constituents. 1. Commitment to Democracy More than anything else, democracy is on the ballot. Because of gerrymandering and voter suppression, some have deemed this District “safe” for the Republicans. . Whether it is healthcare, immigration, infrastructure, or the many other issues affecting our lives, we have not been heard. I am committed to representing every member of the Texas 10th, and to fighting to improve the lives of all! No donation is too small. = Thank you for all of your support. Together, we will win! With respect, Mike = = = = = Paid for by Mike Siegel for Congress: PO Box 2409, Austin, TX 78701.

body:
| |
---
# _Wall Street Journal Editorial Board: Confirm Brett Kavanaugh_
“Judge Kavanaugh was right to call the confirmation process a ‘disgrace’ in his passionate self-defense,” _The Wall Street Journal_ editorial board writes. Dr. Christine Blasey Ford’s “allegation should have been vetted privately, in confidence, as she said she would have preferred. Instead ranking Democrat Dianne Feinstein held it for six weeks and it was leaked—perhaps to cause precisely such a hearing circus.” **[Click here to continue reading](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTI4Ljk1NTExNjExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyOC45NTUxMTYxMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkyMTMxJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/wall-street-journal-confirm-brett-kavanaugh/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=wwr)**. “Average premiums for key Obamacare benchmark plans are set to drop for the first time in the program’s history, Health and Human Services Secretary Alex Azar said Thursday,” Tom Howell Jr. writes in [**_The Washington Times_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTI4Ljk1NTExNjExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyOC45NTUxMTYxMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkyMTMxJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.washingtontimes.com/news/2018/sep/27/obamacare-premiums-drop-first-time/). “Mr. Azar went out of his way to blast the idea — often dubbed ‘Medicare for all’ — in his speech Thursday. He said it would force taxpayers to foot its ‘staggering costs,’ undercut public insurance for seniors and amplify one of the 2010 Affordable Care Act’s noted foibles.” L. Todd Wood writes in [**_The Washington Times_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTI4Ljk1NTExNjExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyOC45NTUxMTYxMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkyMTMxJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.washingtontimes.com/news/2018/sep/27/us-helps-israel-after-russia-shoot-down-syria/) that “with the election of President Trump and the consequent shift to an American foreign policy of strength and forcefulness after the disastrously indecisive Obama years, the situation on the ground and in the skies above Syria has dramatically changed. And it is Israel that is coming out on top.” “The best war is the one not fought,” Ronald Reagan famously said. “Israel’s obvious dominance in the region will go a long way to making that statement ring true,” Wood argues. “The U.S. economy grew as expected in the second quarter, according to a reading Thursday that confirmed that gross domestic product rose at its quickest rate in nearly four years,” Jeff Cox reports for [**CNBC**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTI4Ljk1NTExNjExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyOC45NTUxMTYxMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkyMTMxJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.cnbc.com/2018/09/27/final-us-gross-domestic-product-q2-2018.html?__source=sharebar%7Ctwitter&par=sharebar). “GDP, the broadest measure of how the economy is progressing, increased 4.2 percent, the Commerce Department's Bureau of Economic Analysis reported, the same as expected from economists surveyed by Thomson Reuters. It was the fastest pace since the third quarter of 2014.” “A drug sting lead by Interior Department law enforcement officers this week resulted in the arrest of 75 individuals and the seizure of 248 pounds of heroin, methamphetamine, fentanyl and marijuana on Indian land,” Miranda Green writes in [**_The Hill_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTI4Ljk1NTExNjExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyOC45NTUxMTYxMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkyMTMxJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://thehill.com/business-a-lobbying/408707-interior-department-sting-results-in-multiple-opioid-arrests-in-north). “The operation, conducted over the course of several months in North Carolina is part of the administration’s push to thwart the opioid drug trade, an effort that’s been called the President’s Joint Opioid Reduction Task Force.”
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTI4Ljk1NTExNjExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyOC45NTUxMTYxMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkyMTMxJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTI4Ljk1NTExNjExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyOC45NTUxMTYxMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkyMTMxJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&106&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTI4Ljk1NTExNjExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyOC45NTUxMTYxMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkyMTMxJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&107&&&https://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/unsubscribe_from_topic?verification=5.de26655797f4bb6f464a5bb6e5436a0f&destination=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&topic_id=USWH_1)

Dr. Christine Blasey Ford’s “allegation should have been vetted privately, in confidence, as she said she would have preferred. Instead ranking Democrat Dianne Feinstein held it for six weeks and it was leaked—perhaps to cause precisely such a hearing circus.” . “Average premiums for key Obamacare benchmark plans are set to drop for the first time in the program’s history, Health and Human Services Secretary Alex Azar said Thursday,” Tom Howell Jr. writes in . “Mr. Azar went out of his way to blast the idea — often dubbed ‘Medicare for all’ — in his speech Thursday. He said it would force taxpayers to foot its ‘staggering costs,’ undercut public insurance for seniors and amplify one of the 2010 Affordable Care Act’s noted foibles.” L. Todd Wood writes in that “with the election of President Trump and the consequent shift to an American foreign policy of strength and forcefulness after the disastrously indecisive Obama years, the situation on the ground and in the skies above Syria has dramatically changed. And it is Israel that is coming out on top.” “The best war is the one not fought,” Ronald Reagan famously said. “Israel’s obvious dominance in the region will go a long way to making that statement ring true,” Wood argues. “The U.S. economy grew as expected in the second quarter, according to a reading Thursday that confirmed that gross domestic product rose at its quickest rate in nearly four years,” Jeff Cox reports for . “GDP, the broadest measure of how the economy is progressing, increased 4.2 percent, the Commerce Department's Bureau of Economic Analysis reported, the same as expected from economists surveyed by Thomson Reuters. It was the fastest pace since the third quarter of 2014.” “A drug sting lead by Interior Department law enforcement officers this week resulted in the arrest of 75 individuals and the seizure of 248 pounds of heroin, methamphetamine, fentanyl and marijuana on Indian land,” Miranda Green writes in . “The operation, conducted over the course of several months in North Carolina is part of the administration’s push to thwart the opioid drug trade, an effort that’s been called the President’s Joint Opioid Reduction Task Force.” | |

body:
When I campaigned for governor, I learned just how important grassroots supporters are to sustaining a political campaign. And to tell you the truth, there's no time when grassroots donations matter m |
---
[]()

| | Peter,

When I campaigned for governor, I learned just how important grassroots supporters are to sustaining a political campaign. And to tell you the truth, [**there 's no time when grassroots donations matter more than in the last few weeks before Election Day.**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2d5c/7377f838/3899663c/51f8c666/3702267290/VEsH/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIyMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/john-gregg?refcode=20180928.1&amount=20")

This is the time when a campaign truly kicks its field effort into the highest gear, which as you know is the bread and butter of a winning campaign. And if you're looking to run **the largest voter mobilization program Indiana has ever seen** in a midterm year like my friend Joe Donnelly is -- well, having the resources to run field efforts is non-negotiable.

**Joe 's staff and volunteers are pounding the pavement from sunup to sundown, but they need to be re-stocked with supplies like clipboards, yard signs, and coffee to keep going. Will you donate to give Joe's team the support they need to win in November?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $10>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2d5c/7377f838/3899663c/51f8c661/3702267290/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIxMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/john-gregg?express_lane=true&refcode=20180928.1&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $20>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2d5c/7377f838/3899663c/51f8c661/3702267290/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIyMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/john-gregg?express_lane=true&refcode=20180928.1&amount=20")**
**[Express donate $50>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2d5c/7377f838/3899663c/51f8c661/3702267290/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiI1MCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/john-gregg?express_lane=true&refcode=20180928.1&amount=50")**
**[Express donate $100>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2d5c/7377f838/3899663c/51f8c661/3702267290/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIxMDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/john-gregg?express_lane=true&refcode=20180928.1&amount=100")**
****[Or, donate a different amount>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2d5c/7377f838/3899663c/51f8c660/3702267290/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/john-gregg?refcode=20180928.1")****
This is going to be an incredibly close race -- and Peter, that's all the more reason to support Joe right now. When the polls say a race is too close to call, **it 's critical that the campaign's organizers have the resources to get every last voter to the polls.**

**With out-of-state special interests pouring millions into Indiana to prop up Rep. Mike Braun,** Joe's team won't be able to match them dollar-for-dollar. That's okay. Because as long as they have the resources to keep their organizers in the field, I know they'll be in a good spot.

[**So will you join me in supporting Joe, and make a donation to help his team reach as many voters as possible before Election Day?**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2d5c/7377f838/3899663c/51f8c666/3702267290/VEsB/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIyMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/john-gregg?refcode=20180928.1&amount=20")

Thank you,
John Gregg

name: Jason Yates
subject: SCOTUS WATCH #6
body:
| | Critical Supreme Court Updates from a Faith Perspective
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ie-EuEwprJECnklQBd9pnr0PZuVfOcKLeeg3ObzdqcMVLMmlYfN4dZrjipbdC55akw&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180928com01&n=1)
| Peter, Yesterday the Senate Judiciary Committee and the American people heard the testimonies of Supreme Court nominee, Brett Kavanaugh, and Christine Blasey Ford, a woman accusing Kavanaugh of sexual assault. For ten days the Senate Judiciary Committee delayed a vote even though Democrats held Christine Ford’s letter for weeks until after Kavanaugh’s initial hearing. Left-leaning politicians, actors, and mainstream media rushed to judgment before the day's testimonies, hurling accusations against Brett Kavanaugh with no substantial evidence. And during yesterday's testimonies, Ford insisted that Kavanaugh assaulted her, and Kavanaugh emphatically denied it "before God." This remains a 'he said, she said' situation. While many are rushing to judgment in light of sordid, decades-old allegations suddenly raised against Judge Kavanaugh, we would all do well to remember that in America, we hold to the presumption of innocence. _“I am not questioning that Dr. Ford may have been sexually assaulted by some person in some place at some time. But I have never done that to her or to anyone.”_
–Brett Kavanaugh In Kavanaugh’s opening statement he said, “**Since my nomination in July, there has been a frenzy on the left to come up with something, anything, to block my confirmation. Shortly after I was nominated, the Democratic Senate leader said he would, quote, ‘oppose me with everything he’s got.’ A Democratic senator on this committee publicly referred to me as evil. Evil. Think about that word. And said that those who supported me were, quote, ‘complicit in evil.’ Another Democratic senator on this committee said, quote, ‘Judge Kavanaugh is your worst nightmare.’”** Watch Kavanaugh’s full statement [here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=dqekWylxE9uqlgFGT5BaxCOKGnOt1LABLu9F81pdyq9rCV3jj9nxqJ5AyJHhEoUPU1b2DVgcQc5yibXO2dDEKw&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180928com01&n=2). The Democrats have said it themselves. From the beginning, they determined to do whatever was necessary to block Kavanaugh from being confirmed to the Supreme Court. They have called Kavanaugh evil and those who support Kavanaugh evil. **Hundreds of thousands of faith voters supported Kavanaugh because he has a proven track record of defending the sanctity of life and religious liberty.** **__These issues__**** _are what the battle is truly all about._** This Supreme Court appointment will impact our nation for generations to come. It is far greater than one election cycle. With the retirement of Justice Kennedy, his replacement will most likely be the swing vote in many life-altering cases for decades to come. For this reason, tensions on both sides of the aisle are at an all-time high. Each party understands the weightiness of confirming a pro-life, pro-faith constitutional conservative to the highest court in the land. In Kavanaugh’s opening statement he said, **“The other night Ashley and my daughter Liza said their prayers and little Liza, all of 10 years old, said to Ashley, ‘We should pray for the woman.’ That’s a lot of wisdom from a 10-year-old. We mean no ill will.”** Kavanaugh’s daughter is correct. We need to follow her lead. Pray for Ford, and pray for Brett and Ashley Kavanaugh, their daughters, and this critical seat on the Supreme Court. Prayer is the most powerful action we take at this time. Will you join me in praying for:
* **Truth and justice to prevail** —not just for the parties involved in the confirmation process but for the generations who will be impacted by the outcomes.
* **Wisdom and resolve** for the decision-makers.
* **Peace, protection, and strength** for the families involved.

**United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180928com01&n=3) P.S. If you haven’t contacted your Senators yet - they must hear from you now! Contact them today with our [easy-to-use tool](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=kErcChkhgXyK6emZY6HIjgzUnisRN3F66ADVWMUwgbE&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180928com01&n=4). The future of the Supreme Court is at stake. Our values are in jeopardy. Together, we must make our voices heard. You can check out previous editions of SCOTUS Watch at: [https://myfaithvotes.org/scotuswatch](https:/www.myfaithvotes.org/scotuswatch).
* * *
[Support My Faith Votes with your tax deductible donation.](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66idsHszZ_cNjdrkrk6Ct22R5LqpO-pYuvVIOOj4RsxM_Q&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180928com01&n=6) _My Faith Votes is a non-partisan movement focused on motivating Christians in America to participate in local and national elections and be active members of society. By partnering with local churches, pastors, and national faith leaders, My Faith Votes mobilizes and equips Christians to lead the conversation on the place of faith in culture and politics._
---
* * *
©2018 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180928com01&n=7).
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=xVQJp8sIg0YIME9Lo-Z4syIdVRw_HYS0jEt2wMUQx2eEuRFK5ZOguLktpeYbxh9N&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180928com01&n=8) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FPXYBx5Xyt4ogPU1qeCocIOlLGlV2jWcvDCbIYySOYm8m4a6nxzoW0Ja2quI4O6s&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180928com01&n=9) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=GevmR3RZALWcgxRmRAu8Xs945EaPwemE7bkwg1RsifpjRSkA2HhVJBLM7TbCqLQ4&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180928com01&n=10)

name: Tina Smith
subject: We must respect Dr. Ford's courage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
The FBI must do a full investigation.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4d4ef/c1f7015/6ce0a1bb/11415339/1029028354/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjU1NzgzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_1809_kavanaugh?source=rtw_20180928AM_em&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=") Friend, Judge Kavanaugh is nominated for a lifetime appointment to the highest court in our country -- and now faces a third accusation of sexual misconduct. **There is only one reason the FBI is not currently conducting a thorough investigation: Republicans will stop at nothing to get their man on the Court. This reason is not good enough.** **[Please join me and demand Senate Republicans stop Kavanaugh's confirmation process until there is a full and complete FBI investigation. Sign the petition here. ](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4d4ef/c1f7015/6ce0a1bb/11415339/1029028354/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjU1NzgzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_1809_kavanaugh?source=rtw_20180928AM_em&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=")** **[Sign the Petition](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4d4ef/c1f7015/6ce0a1bb/11415339/1029028354/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjU1NzgzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_1809_kavanaugh?source=rtw_20180928AM_em&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=")** I watched the testimony of Dr. Blasey Ford, and the honesty, courage, and conviction of both her actions and her words. This must be a turning point -- on the Supreme Court and in the lives of every American. She has displayed courage and bravery in the face of harsh questioning, a national media spotlight, and partisan attacks. She faced this traumatic moment in her life and has confronted Republicans desperate to discredit her in a Senate hearing room. **[The least she deserves is for her testimony to be respected and for the FBI to conduct a full investigation. Please, join me in urging the Senate to respect her courage and ask for a full FBI investigation.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4d4ef/c1f7015/6ce0a1bb/11415339/1029028354/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjU1NzgzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_1809_kavanaugh?source=rtw_20180928AM_em&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=")**[ ](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4d4ef/c1f7015/6ce0a1bb/11415339/1029028354/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjU1NzgzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_1809_kavanaugh?source=rtw_20180928AM_em&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=") Thank you, and please stay engaged and keep calling your Senators. There is too much at stake to stop. Tina

name: TimKaine.com
subject: Our children are watching
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek, our children are watching.

Yesterday, Dr. Blasey Ford presented herself as extremely credible and her testimony was courageous.

If we're going to be respectful of the seriousness of the allegation, Tim believes we have to hear from Ms. Ramirez and Ms. Swetnick. We need to subpoena Mark Judge to come testify. And there may be other witnesses we should hear from.

Remember, our children are watching. If an allegation of serious sexual assault gets swept under the rug, it will make it harder for survivors across the country to come out and seek help. Let's hear from everybody, do the FBI investigation that should be done, and do it in a respectful manner.

That's what a deliberative body like the Senate should do. This nomination cannot be rushed through without the investigation that is deserved, the FBI investigation that Dr. Blasey Ford has always requested.

[Sign your name if you agree.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1051/3e0906/71ee407b/3e3674f9/1123445960/VEsH/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/kavanaugh-hearing?source=20180928_1_PET_TEAM_kavanaugh-hearing&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Sign+your+name+if+you+agree&utm_campaign=20180928_1_PET_TEAM_kavanaugh-hearing")

_Team Kaine_
* * *
_This note has been composed by Tim Kaine 's staff, adapted from his remarks in a debate against his opponent on [September 26, 2018.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1051/3e0906/71ee407b/3e3674f8/1123445960/VEsE/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/kavanaugh-hearing?source=20180928_1_PET_TEAM_kavanaugh-hearing&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+September+26+2018&utm_campaign=20180928_1_PET_TEAM_kavanaugh-hearing")_
---
* * *
|
---
[](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1051/3e0906/71ee407b/3e3674ff/1123445960/VEsF/ "https://www.facebook.com/timkaine?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=20180928_1_PET_TEAM_kavanaugh-hearing&source=20180928_1_PET_TEAM_kavanaugh-hearing") [](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1051/3e0906/71ee407b/3e3674fe/1123445960/VEsC/ "https://twitter.com/timkaine?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=20180928_1_PET_TEAM_kavanaugh-hearing&source=20180928_1_PET_TEAM_kavanaugh-hearing") [](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1051/3e0906/71ee407b/3e3674fd/1123445960/VEsD/ "https://www.instagram.com/timkaine/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=20180928_1_PET_TEAM_kavanaugh-hearing&source=20180928_1_PET_TEAM_kavanaugh-hearing")

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address by [**clicking here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1051/3e0906/71ee407b/3e3674fc/1123445960/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/update-your-information?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=6+-+clicking+here&utm_campaign=20180928_1_PET_TEAM_kavanaugh-hearing&source=20180928_1_PET_TEAM_kavanaugh-hearing")

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. However, if you'd prefer to receive fewer emails, you can [**click here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1051/3e0906/71ee407b/3e3674f3/1123445960/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/less-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=7+-+click+here&utm_campaign=20180928_1_PET_TEAM_kavanaugh-hearing&source=20180928_1_PET_TEAM_kavanaugh-hearing")

subject: we only have until Sunday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Lipinski for Congress |
body:
Peter,

Our Congress is broken, and the Republicans in power are
doing nothing to fix it. In 40 days, we’ll have the chance to
elect a wave of Democrats and we are committed to leading the
charge on systemic fixes to get Congress working again.

At midnight on Sunday we close our books on the final
quarterly Federal Election Commission (FEC) report of the midterm
elections. Every dollar counts now more than ever.

Our goal is to raise $10,000 before midnight Sunday to show
that Democrats are ready for sweeping change, and are putting
serious grassroots power behind it. Click here to add your
contribution to our FEC report right now →

name: Erica Bernstein
subject: There is no "too little"
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
There is only too late.

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c378370/7ab0e2c4/7e3018c7/3498c7e7/3358315541/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-sept-eoq?refcode=OHQ09288A") Friend, There is no such thing as a donation that is "too little". I get so genuinely sad when I hear from grassroots donors that they don't believe their "small" donation can make a difference. Let me tell you something right now: Every single dollar matters. This campaign is funded and fueled by you -- grassroots supporters, who believe in something better for their communities, and see that Ben can help make it happen. We don't have $1 million corporate checks rolling in because we know, when the chips come down, we have a better campaign when it's supported by real people like you. **But, to be honest, there is such a thing as too late.** [**We have an aggressive goal of raising $25,000 before our September 30th deadline so we can fill our GOTV fund and get volunteers out across Maryland, talking to voters. Will you donate $5 or more now to help us raise the remaining $14,560?**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c378370/7ab0e2c4/7e3018c7/3498c7e7/3358315541/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-sept-eoq?refcode=OHQ09288A") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c378370/7ab0e2c4/7e3018c7/3498c7e6/3358315541/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-sept-eoq?refcode=OHQ09288A&amount=5&express_lane=true")

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Pence Victory |
body:
Election Day 2018 is almost here... That means we keep pushing to the finish line. All of our hard work over the past year is beginning to pay off... [ ](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=28022307e8b44acb81a19f5e72aa4c29&_e=p7CeJMrWFXrdEIMK9JyJORYkuncs1OrlFbS73YmSyjE4I3ZYPovXWKuFN4SxIC_xVLI1R2qwJO7UETjuTAqY3rmjGwEOi-gjeX_idRgTxVadXJAMI9UnFnX6_FjAY_T67JNoQ0Kvl34siRHffhP6OKCcrX6KmwPRHE15pSeCYje1X3JQ1KXZYDL_x37vxNiu2PLoHaRILYGtcOsT6DJfwYFp2CaczcgUhr3nUQZfeLEISqGW50dIOXMo1pG9BW9pesOa0A5Qhm74RX6drawinfSj-2JwwLcab2yS_ctH4EYcRVdeZXpKCaa-B15qB8LbikCFZPEInl6CJguIPbu37LhOXaqSgIKFv2jJCVqrKM463qvqGdSu-tMfqEzNPMjTJTR9hhxJx_dKrsq7tBXjk2Eb1MN4vEJTw29DSxiyjNo%3D) | |
---
**Election Day 2018 is almost here...**

_That means we keep pushing to the finish line._

All of our hard work over the past year is beginning to pay off, but now isn’t the time to get complacent.

There is still plenty of work to be done, and I’m not letting up until we achieve victory on November 6.

**[Help us keep up our campaign’s incredible momentum by donating $18 now>>](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=28022307e8b44acb81a19f5e72aa4c29&_e=p7CeJMrWFXrdEIMK9JyJORYkuncs1OrlFbS73YmSyjE4I3ZYPovXWKuFN4SxIC_x0pPMeUd2_iQU-XHvxR4mCK1H7S8q6RtKvvRodQUWnARKxwCaJ64fEdCMaxQKaqilrT7T77jN3Shd9jnKZ1_AAX9S3dYWr5YWt5SaXtMlJ-sxhwS_Yq81j9ql5FLPXx_Jt3YeUi5Uf7SAOUG3BBm_mngNcbGzMwZpEIdhu5qTwkoKkhvINdFomGNjwM0p3QbUy7Bg9b8iNlSXNOZxFbDkbBqWIpUVMaseJeHqUex5vkqVL9XSP4yl_lEU0e7eq4YqXlnjMXTos5hCbrAXWXDR972DBapNx1UMOhETTu0YM03g-6pdpZPm-L7yu7kulYRorbV7zyb7EcxywAEp04EZVCJD-4lBQuT8trKkqpsDteoi-iGU2vcWVPcvtm3IMUcT)**

_As a veteran Marine officer, I’m ready to fight to get things done in Washington, but I can’t accomplish my Hoosier-First agenda without your support._

Now more than ever, President Donald Trump and Vice President Mike Pence need a trusted Hoosier voice in Congress fighting for our priorities in the Sixth District and around the country.

**[Donate any amount to help me fight for our conservative Hoosier priorities and the Trump-Pence Make America Great Again agenda>>](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=28022307e8b44acb81a19f5e72aa4c29&_e=p7CeJMrWFXrdEIMK9JyJORYkuncs1OrlFbS73YmSyjE4I3ZYPovXWKuFN4SxIC_xVLI1R2qwJO7UETjuTAqY3rmjGwEOi-gjeX_idRgTxVadXJAMI9UnFnX6_FjAY_T67JNoQ0Kvl34siRHffhP6OKCcrX6KmwPRHE15pSeCYje1X3JQ1KXZYDL_x37vxNiu2PLoHaRILYGtcOsT6DJfwY5J6wMLn5zVIdd4I85qiW6ItJ3kmUxmbLLzxINnXGaSrmmdBPspbExanVe4km1B8VNecVWR_2nnVJkYDboRiJg3wXDYuWAMibIBFOSpwTotYb0bqK7x-KEH95-05Y9eXV-N4WVO1QSRmsdREuoaWm_nJOBhie00lJX8lnjHDnNQBeRt_DYOZeyYRIvzrD7e2Vqqj9Yvwi8P5GErAdoIx1I%3D)**

Here’s the work we still have left to do.

We are up against a major moment in our campaign – **the September End of Quarter Fundraising Deadline.**

This is the final quarterly deadline before the election, and that’s why we’re setting a big goal.

Our goal is to raise **$30,000,** and we have to hit our target before September 30 at midnight.

I know it’s a big ask, but with the help of our supporters, I know we can do it.

As a former Marine, I’m always up for a challenge. Are you?

**[Stand with me for our conservative Hoosier values and ensure victory in November by donating any amount>>](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=28022307e8b44acb81a19f5e72aa4c29&_e=p7CeJMrWFXrdEIMK9JyJORYkuncs1OrlFbS73YmSyjE4I3ZYPovXWKuFN4SxIC_xVLI1R2qwJO7UETjuTAqY3rmjGwEOi-gjeX_idRgTxVadXJAMI9UnFnX6_FjAY_T67JNoQ0Kvl34siRHffhP6OKCcrX6KmwPRHE15pSeCYje1X3JQ1KXZYDL_x37vxNiu2PLoHaRILYGtcOsT6DJfwQV_TsjtD0gWs30AYnlXbeWehDd1HGTS7c6-Nx4L9FDZknZ3Cxc-_13xVCv_PFEYNQZ5quWtSDUAwT1qXKsOSQ-CLUmBzK6T_wyOZFOv2YdquQyxZrnPKw-WF3io645xh9V0OXJGQ18jT2wA1lg1llsfikby0OxzkDqIpoE6FkeQJgzMmToz1204xd1THcab2zWy6ra5z0j9flysUa2P_2I%3D)**

I’m Ready to Serve, Again!
Greg Pence

name: Zack Malitz, betofortexas.com
subject: Science says there’s one simple thing that’s proven to actually increase voter turnout
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

Right now, we’re living under the looming threat of TEN outside groups
that have pledged to spend millions in Texas to halt our progress with
slick, misleading TV ads attacking Beto and our campaign. They think they
can totally derail everything we’ve worked so hard for.

Our mission? Simple: to cut through all the noise. Science says there’s
one simple thing that’s proven to actually increase voter turnout:
person-to-person conversations with voters. So that’s exactly what we’re
doing: organizing more volunteers to knock on more doors, make more phone
calls, send more text messages and talk to more voters than any campaign
ever has in Texas history.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/8988?refcode=em20180928&t=1019&akid=13676%2E444211%2EedeJjl ]If we fall short of our end-of-quarter fundraising goal, our team may
need to reconsider where we send our resources during the home stretch of
the campaign. To be blunt, we can’t afford to fall short. That’s
why I’m asking you to pitch in a
donation of
$3
to help us reach our goal: raising $5 million online before midnight on
Sunday.

[21]Beto for Texas

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/8988?refcode=em20180928&t=1020&akid=13676%2E444211%2EedeJjl ]Contribute
$3
»

It’s true: all the research shows that volunteers have more power to
increase voter turnout than anything campaigns can pay for -- even more
than slick TV ads or yard signs.

But it’s going to take more than showing up on Election Day to knock on a
few doors or make a few calls to pull off the kind of historic volunteer
and voter mobilization we need to win.

It’s going to take real, determined, disciplined leadership by thousands
of volunteers taking on mission-critical responsibilities in these final
weeks of the election. And empowering tens of thousands of volunteers
takes significant resources.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/8988?refcode=em20180928&t=1021&akid=13676%2E444211%2EedeJjl ]I know we’ve been leaning on you a lot these past couple of weeks, but
we wouldn’t ask if it wasn’t so important -- and if it wasn’t making a
huge difference. Can you give a
donation of
$3
to Beto’s campaign to help us reach our final end-of-quarter goal of this
campaign?

Thank you for everything you’ve done to power our campaign thus far. We
literally could not do this without you.

Onward!

Zack Malitz
Field Director
Beto for Texas

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/8988?refcode=em20180928&t=1022&akid=13676%2E444211%2EedeJjl ]Contribute
$3
»

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betofortexas.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=13676%2E444211%2EedeJjl

Science says there’s one simple thing that’s proven to actually increase voter turnout: person-to-person conversations with voters. So that’s exactly what we’re doing: organizing more volunteers to knock on more doors, make more phone calls, send more text messages and talk to more voters than any campaign ever has in Texas history. [ ]If we fall short of our end-of-quarter fundraising goal, our team may need to reconsider where we send our resources during the home stretch of the campaign. To be blunt, we can’t afford to fall short. That’s why I’m asking you to pitch in a donation of $3 to help us reach our goal: raising $5 million online before midnight on Sunday. [21]Beto for Texas [ ]Contribute $3 » It’s true: all the research shows that volunteers have more power to increase voter turnout than anything campaigns can pay for -- even more than slick TV ads or yard signs. But it’s going to take more than showing up on Election Day to knock on a few doors or make a few calls to pull off the kind of historic volunteer and voter mobilization we need to win. It’s going to take real, determined, disciplined leadership by thousands of volunteers taking on mission-critical responsibilities in these final weeks of the election. And empowering tens of thousands of volunteers takes significant resources. [ ]I know we’ve been leaning on you a lot these past couple of weeks, but we wouldn’t ask if it wasn’t so important -- and if it wasn’t making a huge difference. Can you give a donation of $3 to Beto’s campaign to help us reach our final end-of-quarter goal of this campaign? Thank you for everything you’ve done to power our campaign thus far. We literally could not do this without you. Onward! Zack Malitz Field Director Beto for Texas [ ]Contribute $3 » Contribute to Beto's campaign:

subject: My first and only report
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|

| | | I face the most critical Federal Election Commission (FEC) deadline of my Senate reelection campaign yet this Sunday.

This is the first and only quarterly FEC report I will file against Libertarian Gary Johnson before the election. Read more below on what progress could be lost if I'm defeated this year, or, if you've heard enough:

**_[Help me reach our new fundraising goal before we must publicly report our numbers>>](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q3?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+Help+me+reach+our+new+fundraising+goal+b&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180928_1_5&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180928_1_5&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180928_1_5")_**

* * *

Nearly every day, we face news about President Trump's scandals, his lies, and the catastrophes created by his administration. But that shouldn't detract from the progress that is being made despite his chaos.

**I have been leading the conversation on cybersecurity and the threats we face from foreign hackers.** Beyond our election infrastructure, our energy grid and transportation systems are also susceptible to hacking attacks, with potentially disastrous consequences. We secured $380 million for election security earlier this year, and my amendment to establish a national cyber warfare doctrine passed the Senate last month.

**I 've also been fighting to protect investments in our rural transportation infrastructure in New Mexico. **The Senate recently passed my bipartisan amendment for an additional $50 million to help maintain the Southwest Chief Amtrak route. Trains help connect New Mexico to the rest of the country, and keeping this route is critical to the local economy and the rural communities that rely on this line.

**[DONATE $29 NOW>>](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q3?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+DONATE+ask+NOW+gtgt&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180928_1_5&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180928_1_5&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180928_1_5")**
**And while the Trump administration makes moves to shrink our public lands, I am fighting to protect them.** I introduced legislation to shield the Chaco Canyon area -- a sacred place to all New Mexicans -- from drilling. Protecting Chaco from further development will ensure we don't lose its priceless history.

Some of these updates don't warrant a breaking news alert on your phone, but they are making a difference in people's lives -- and that has Gary Johnson, Republicans, and super PACs worried.

**Sunday is the last quarterly FEC deadline before the election, and****afterwards****I will have to report my fundraising numbers for the first time since Johnson challenged me. With Johnson giving six-figures to his own campaign, we can 't be caught off guard.**

**_[That is why I am asking for your support today. To report our strongest FEC numbers yet, our new budget goal is to raise $55,830 before our Sunday deadline. All this hard work and more will be undone if one of my extreme opponents defeats me in November. Will you contribute now and help us close our budget gap before we must publically report our numbers?](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q3?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=3+-+That+is+why+I+am+asking+for+your+support&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180928_1_5&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180928_1_5&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180928_1_5")_**

name: Khizr Khan
subject: we're at a crossroads
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
Too few of our elected leaders in Washington are willing to stand up for what is right. Republican leaders are attacking our health care and they are undermining our Constitution.
Tom O'Halleran is running for Congress in Arizona's 1st district, a critical race to getting Congress back on track. Click here to donate to Tom's campaign and help him put Arizona families first.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633eeb/1a8421e1/19a39aaaa/4927cd59/2627404905/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_header&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
Friend, Too few of our elected leaders in Washington are willing to stand up for what is right. Republican leaders are attacking our health care and they are undermining our Constitution. They have failed to stand up to the president and hold his administration accountable. My name is Khizr Khan, and I am a Gold Star father. I am working to elect Democrats across the country who will stand up for what is right -- **and I am supporting Tom O 'Halleran because he is doing so every day in Congress, and he needs our help win re-election this fall.** [**Friend, will you help Tom win re-election with a donation today, ahead of his end-of-quarter fundraising deadline on Sunday?**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.28_b1_kk_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Tom has proven that he is an independent voice who will protect our constitutional values and always do the right thing for his constituents and for this great country -- even if it is not politically convenient. He is also the most vulnerable Democrat in the House, so he truly does need our support. **[Please make a donation to Tom's campaign, friend. ](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.28_b1_kk_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**This country is at a crossroads. It is up to Democrats to stand for our democracy and we must ensure that we elect true leaders like Tom in this important time. Thank you, Khizr Khan Gold Star Father | ****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.28_b1_kk_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****
---

**_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq32018?refcode=footer-bio&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=").**_**
** **
** **
** **
** **

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can [_click here_](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633eeb/1a8421e1/19a39aaaa/4927cd5d/2627404905/VEsB/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/s/less-emails").

Your grassroots support is critical to helping Tom become a strong voice for all Arizonans. If you'd still like to unsubscribe from our emails, [_click here_](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633eeb/1a8421e1/19a39aaaa/4927cd5e/2627404905/VEsO/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/unsubscribe").

name: Kathy Manning
subject: "Toss-up" means we CAN win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
|
---

| | **Right now this race is a toss-up.** What happens on Election Day is up to us. If we keep hitting goals and keep the momentum on our side, we will defeat Ted Budd. [**But we've got a big FEC goal in just 60 HOURS and we're still about $12,000 short. Will you rush in a contribution?**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/6542794d/e3b7d3/5d35fae0/25554850/2064762562/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180928?refcode=kme180928_m&recurring=true") A new poll shows me ahead. With your help, we have gained a tremendous amount of ground. Families in this district are tired of Rep. Ted Budd. We all know he puts special interests above their families and their communities. He also reaps the benefits of that stance -- it's probably why, according to a recent report, Budd rakes in so many campaign donations from big banks, credit card companies, insurance companies, and payday lenders. Families here want and deserve something better. That's exactly what we're fighting for -- a better future for all of our families. But we've got an election to win first. [**This is our biggest FEC Quarter goal yet -- the last one before Election Day. Let's get this done team. Rush in a contribution.**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/6542794d/e3b7d3/5d35fae0/25554850/2064762562/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180928?refcode=kme180928_m&recurring=true") Thanks! Kathy
