name: Justin Jones
subject: Abigail’s “unprecedented support”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
One elections expert told The Washington Post that Abigail's support is "unprecedented," and it is a direct result of her candidacy and the compelling message she is offering voters.
| | Peter, As we told you on Tuesday, an independent poll this week found that Abigail is now tied with Rep. Dave Brat, 47 percent to his 47 percent, even though this district has elected Republicans for years running. Well, we wanted to follow up with how _The Washington Post_ covered this result: [](https://act.myngp.com/el/AePtSFHb8LQCzNTXUYYLANvFvo4Fnct994Wr2WXw2jI=/Vg7UR7Ddg7-3VfbzZjJUmDjDle7X4jWsA9ZD3sfwpeg=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.28_b1_jj_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) One elections expert told the _Post_ that **Abigail 's support is "unprecedented," and it is a direct result of her candidacy and the compelling message she is offering voters. [_(You can make a grassroots donation so we can continue building support for this unprecedented campaign here.)_](https://act.myngp.com/el/AePtSFHb8LQCzNTXUYYLANvFvo4Fnct994Wr2WXw2jI=/Vg7UR7Ddg7-3VfbzZjJUmDjDle7X4jWsA9ZD3sfwpeg=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.28_b1_jj_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)** **" Respondents in this poll who favor Spanberger do not appear simply to be 'voting against Trump' or in protest,"** Dan Palazzolo, a University of Richmond political science professor, told the _Post._ **" They are voting for her."** [**Peter, please consider making a grassroots donation today, ahead of the end of the third fundraising quarter on Sunday.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/AePtSFHb8LQCzNTXUYYLANvFvo4Fnct994Wr2WXw2jI=/Vg7UR7Ddg7-3VfbzZjJUmDjDle7X4jWsA9ZD3sfwpeg=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.28_b1_jj_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) We will report our fundraising numbers to the Federal Elections Commission after the deadline, and it's important to have a strong showing so we can reach more voters across our district and win this tied race. Thanks, Justin Jones _Communications Director, Spanberger for Congress_ [](https://act.myngp.com/el/AePtSFHb8LQCzNTXUYYLANvFvo4Fnct994Wr2WXw2jI=/Vg7UR7Ddg7-3VfbzZjJUmDjDle7X4jWsA9ZD3sfwpeg=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.28_b1_jj_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/AePtSFHb8LQCzNTXUYYLANvFvo4Fnct994Wr2WXw2jI=/Vg7UR7Ddg7-3VfbzZjJUmDjDle7X4jWsA9ZD3sfwpeg=?refcode=footer&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) _Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/AePtSFHb8LQCzNTXUYYLANvFvo4Fnct994Wr2WXw2jI=/mNHErTs-R-yqo9vKrnt2jOWCX0MpvR7iUrlgku9OWNE=)_

name: David
subject: They let me out!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
Peter,
I emailed you once before, when the last quarterly deadline was near. I generally stay behind the scenes as the campaign’s Finance Director, so you may not recognize my name, but if you’ve donated to this campaign, chances are I recognize yours!
My day is usually spent creating lists for call time, entering data and donations into a computer, and helping to keep our budget on track. But today, they let me out to write you an email, and the first thing I want to say is, THANK YOU. We set an ambitious goal of raising $100,000 online over the last ten days of the quarter **(the final quarter before the election)** , and yesterday, it didn’t look like we’d make it because we were over $50,000 away. But the response we’ve received since then is remarkable—we raised over $25,000 in the last 24 hours!
We’re now within reach of our goal, and if we can hit it, we’ll have the resources we need to keep up with the incredible pace J.D. has set for all of us. **On this campaign, we try to match J.D.’s unbelievable work ethic, so we have no intention of letting up!** [**_Say you’re with us with a contribution today!_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2381269/13236437/-1175733768?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTQxYjVlOS02OGMzLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0N2M4OWUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lbHBMxUf2nKguBtxwKEftsS5qvBYURcjtlUzmGav6ck=)
I want to again thank all of you who have given to this campaign. We appreciate your support more than I can possibly tell you. Please know we wouldn’t be asking again if this wasn’t so important, but **we have the opportunity to do something truly special here** in defeating someone like Steve King, and we want to make sure we’ve done all we can to make it happen. [**_That’s why I’m asking you today to please consider one more contribution before the quarter ends at midnight Sunday._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2381270/13236438/-1175733768?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTQxYjVlOS02OGMzLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0N2M4OWUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lbHBMxUf2nKguBtxwKEftsS5qvBYURcjtlUzmGav6ck=) Your help could mean the difference between victory and defeat.
Standing Tall for All,
David Lamando
Finance Director

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2381271/13236439/-1175733768?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTQxYjVlOS02OGMzLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0N2M4OWUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lbHBMxUf2nKguBtxwKEftsS5qvBYURcjtlUzmGav6ck=)

Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee

Sioux City, IA 51102

name: DWS (Congresswoman)
subject: Two important pieces of business today
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
You know how I work by now. I don't hold back. When Trump attacks immigrants, women, poor people, or other groups of Americans, I fight back. When Republicans in Congress come after health care, Plann
|
---
| | Number One: **Thank you all so much for your support on my birthday.** You all reached the goal with room to spare, and I couldn't be prouder to have you on this team. Number Two: **We can't stop there.** The most important FEC deadline we've faced to date -- the end of the last full fundraising quarter of this election -- is __this Sunday.__ Thanks to your birthday surprise, we're only about $12,000 away from our $28,000 FEC goal with 48 hours until the deadline. [**Can you rush in a contribution to get us the rest of the way to this goal?**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113cb2/622b7b5b/1cef46b4/307b6b87/1596029977/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180928?refcode=dwse180928_m&recurring=true&amount=5") You know how I work by now. **I don't hold back.** When Trump attacks immigrants, women, poor people, or other groups of Americans, I fight back. When Republicans in Congress come after health care, Planned Parenthood, Medicare or Social Security, **I fight back.** **I've never been afraid to speak out against Republican hypocrisy when the well-being of our families and our communities is at risk.** And that won't change. Republicans would LOVE a Congress without me in it. This goal is public for all of my opponents to see. That means if we reach this goal, everyone will see our strength -- or if we miss it, they'll see weakness. [**We can't back down now. With only 48 hours left to the deadline, give what you can.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113cb2/622b7b5b/1cef46b4/307b6b87/1596029977/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180928?refcode=dwse180928_m&recurring=true&amount=5") Thank you for being a part of this team. Debbie
---

|
---
| | Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress

clean_body: You know how I work by now. I don't hold back. When Trump attacks immigrants, women, poor people, or other groups of Americans, I fight back. When Republicans in Congress come after health care, Plann | | | Number One: Thank you all so much for your support on my birthday. You all reached the goal with room to spare, and I couldn't be prouder to have you on this team. Number Two: We can't stop there. The most important FEC deadline we've faced to date -- the end of the last full fundraising quarter of this election -- is this Sunday. Thanks to your birthday surprise, we're only about $12,000 away from our $28,000 FEC goal with 48 hours until the deadline. "" You know how I work by now. I don't hold back. When Trump attacks immigrants, women, poor people, or other groups of Americans, I fight back. When Republicans in Congress come after health care, Planned Parenthood, Medicare or Social Security, I fight back. I've never been afraid to speak out against Republican hypocrisy when the well-being of our families and our communities is at risk. And that won't change. Republicans would LOVE a Congress without me in it. This goal is public for all of my opponents to see. That means if we reach this goal, everyone will see our strength -- or if we miss it, they'll see weakness. "" Thank you for being a part of this team. Debbie | | | Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress

Friends - the money is stacked against us in the Florida Senate race that will decide Senate control.

CNN has ranked this seat as one of the **most likely to flip parties** in 2018. And after a recent poll showed us within one point of Tea Party Gov. Rick Scott,** **now is not the **time to be falling short of our big end-of-quarter goal.**

**That's why a generous group of donors is offering to TRIPLE every gift before Sunday night's critical FEC fundraising deadline. name: Terese Casey
subject: I'm proud of my husband
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6272/51dbcc2a/13df1b55/3abcecf/2406444441/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/")
Hi there,

I know you're probably tired of getting emails like these, so thanks for reading this one.

At the end of this email I'm going to ask you to make a donation to my husband's campaign. I wouldn't ask if it wasn't important, but Bob has a big fundraising deadline tomorrow at midnight, and right now he's about $30,000 away from meeting his fundraising goal.

If he meets that goal, he'll have the resources to share his message with Pennsylvania voters, to invest in a strong organizing program to get out the vote and to fund the best possible campaign through Election Day. But, if he falls short, he'll have to cut some really important budget items, and that puts this Senate seat at risk.

I'm not saying this as Bob's wife, but as a Pennsylvanian and a citizen who is concerned about the direction our country is heading in: it is absolutely critical that we re-elect Bob because he stands up to the President when his policies would hurt Pennsylvania families. He's fighting to preserve protections for people with pre-existing conditions and will do everything he can to block the administration's attacks on Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security. He's already passed landmark legislation to protect students from sexual assault, and he's still fighting to make our education system work for everyone. He's a champion for seniors, workers, Americans with disabilities, children, teachers... for all of us.

The campaign finance report that Bob needs to file after Sunday's deadline is going to send a signal to the Republicans who want him out of office: if they see a strong report, they'll invest less in this race. But if they sense any weakness, they're going to go all-in trying to replace Bob with someone who will rubber-stamp the President's dangerous policies.

We can't let that happen. We need to vote, to make sure our friends vote and -- if we can -- to make investments in campaigns that are making a difference for our communities. So please consider making a $5 donation to support Bob today. Your gift will help him meet this fundraising goal and will support a strong campaign through Election Day.

Here's the best link: **_[secure.bobcasey.com/deadline](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180928_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Thanks for your support,

Terese

| | Bob needs a strong team to help keep this Senate seat blue so he can continue to protect Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security, fight for working families and be a check on the Trump administration.

Will you make your first donation to help out?
[DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180928_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
---

Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc.
---
PO Box 58746, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania 19102

Contributions or gifts to Bob Casey for Senate are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to: **dpwillis67@gmail.com**
If that is not your preferred email address, you can update your information [here.](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6272/51dbcc2a/13df1b55/3abcec9/2406444441/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/s/update-your-contact-information?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") We believe emails are an important way to stay in contact with supporters, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6272/51dbcc2a/13df1b55/3abceca/2406444441/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/s/update-your-preferences?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Bob Casey for Senate appreciates any feedback you might have. [Click here](mailto:info@bobcasey.com?Subject=Feedback) to contact Bob Casey for Senate with any questions, concerns, or ideas. Want to stay updated on the campaign through social media? You can like Bob Casey for Senate on [Facebook](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6272/51dbcc2a/13df1b55/3abcecb/2406444441/VEsA/ "https://www.facebook.com/BobCaseyJr/") or follow the campaign on [Twitter](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6272/51dbcc2a/13df1b55/3abced4/2406444441/VEsB/ "https://twitter.com/Bob_Casey") or [Instagram](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6272/51dbcc2a/13df1b55/3abced5/2406444441/VEsO/ "https://www.instagram.com/bobcaseyjr/"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6272/51dbcc2a/13df1b55/3abced6/2406444441/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") from Bob Casey for Senate emails.

name: Jason Yates
subject: Dr. David Jeremiah LIVE w/ My Faith Votes
body:
| | Explore the powerful relevance of spiritual armor.
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iXf3gw0SBkD1n0daNPbuHzSejNbDR8c2bWf8XI-T8D5cHqTME3l0I6NB3tg152TS4g&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180928mfvl01&n=1)
| My Faith Votes LIVE [A Conversation with Dr. David Jeremiah](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iXf3gw0SBkD1n0daNPbuHzSejNbDR8c2bWf8XI-T8D5cHqTME3l0I6NB3tg152TS4g&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180928mfvl01&n=2)
**Date:** Tuesday, October 2, 2018
**Time:** 5:30PM ET | 2:30PM PT **_"We can embrace change by knowing we serve an unchanging God."_** **\- Dr. David Jeremiah** Peter, We live in a time of deep uncertainty. And yet, the Bible promises we were created to enjoy lives of freedom, even in times when the world around us seems filled with darkness. We were created to be overcomers, conquering the greatest obstacles in our lives. You’re invited to [join our online live conversation with Dr. Jeremiah](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iXf3gw0SBkD1n0daNPbuHzSejNbDR8c2bWf8XI-T8D5cHqTME3l0I6NB3tg152TS4g&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180928mfvl01&n=3) and hear about his latest book, “Overcomer: _8 Ways to Live a Life of Unstoppable Strength, Unmovable Faith, and Unbelievable Power,”_ and how individuals can overcome life's everyday challenges with the power of God. He will also touch upon the importance of the Christian voice in this years‘ midterm elections. Dr. Jeremiah is among the best known Christian leaders in the world and a My Faith Votes Influencer. He serves as senior pastor of Shadow Mountain Community Church in El Cajon, California and is the founder and host of Turning Point. Turning Point‘s 30-minute radio program is heard on more than 2,200 radio stations daily. name: Frank Schultz, MenendezForNJ.com
subject: Putting a real check on Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Menendez for Senate
body:
Friend,

Democrats across the country are energized and ready to take back Congress.

We can do it, but that means flipping red seats blue and holding every Democratic seat we have. But there are more than twice as many Democratic-held Senate seats up for grabs in 2018, so there is no room for error.

We can't afford to lose this seat.

[**This is our last end-of-quarter deadline before Election Day and we have a grassroots goal of $25,000 to raise before September 30th. We need you now, more than ever. Can you help us hit this goal?**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cdf/3af3c5d/3924a308/4ec32ed3/2492639229/VEsH/ name: Phil Bredesen
subject: I still have a high-school civics view of our country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bredesen for Senate
body:
| Peter -- In a moment, I’m going to ask you to chip in $10 or whatever you can to our campaign before the final end-of-quarter deadline of this race. **But first, I want to explain the choice we’re giving voters in this race.** I still have a high-school civics view of our country. I think we have a government that was brilliantly designed by our founders, and a government that can be an enormous force for good to create opportunity. In the past decade or so, something has happened to our politics that has paralyzed our government. Hard-nosed partisanship, take-no-prisoners tactics, and toxic division have made getting things done in Washington near impossible. Meanwhile, there’s another person in this race who has been in Washington for the past 16 years learning the politics of the Swamp -- and frankly, she has gotten very good at it. If voters want more of the same, then I’m not their candidate. But if voters want someone who brings experience in the business world, experience as a mayor and governor, and an interest in working with people to get things done, then I hope they’ll give me a shot. That’s why I’m applying for the job. Tennessee voters have a choice in this election -- and every time a grassroots supporter like you pitches in to our campaign, you’re helping us put our positive message in front of voters. That’s why I’m asking: **Can you chip in $10 or whatever you can so we have the resources we’ll need to get it done? Our final end-of-quarter deadline before Election Day is Sunday night, and your support will be critical to making sure this race stays focused on our message, not dark money attacks.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2382150/13248502/510384404?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZmQ3NjY3OC03MmMzLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0N2M4OWUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TXbt9lLT__E5AU68ISevtTOO1MHlIYJF14lTVZl5Kf4=&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em180928-eoq-3-express-10&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=)

name: Greg Stanton
subject: making sure you got the invite
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
Friend,

I want to make sure you received [this invitation](https://act.myngp.com/el/N6kkaNPsrxSbRaPdl7iaGEWCRuZDvU24Rzna1YU4aPM=/oTqaO03myY3yvOMwLFDhh4c9M-upJop4Un3S60JUtxY=) to my last event before our critical deadline. This quarterly deadline is the last chance we have to show our strength and momentum before election day.

Looking forward to seeing you tomorrow!

body:

I need your help more than ever, friends. We're coming up on a huge end-of-month fundraising deadline in two days, but right now we're still $24,509 short.
Missing this goal isn't an option if we want to defeat Governor Chris Sununu and stop him from pushing Trump's agenda in New Hampshire.
But I'm not taking any money from corporate special interests, so we won't be able to close this gap unless grassroots donors like you give right now.
**And with time running out, we're still short of what we need to hit our goal and win in New Hampshire. **

clean_body: Derek, We know the Democrats are busy activating their out-of-state donors and volunteers, and the left is energized and angry across the country. We need to show them that CONSERVATIVES are energized and fired up right here in New Hampshire so we can send Eddie Edwards and Steve Negron to Washington. With your donation, the NHGOP will be able to send out mail, create and print campaign materials, and support our grassroots efforts to get Republicans to the polls in November. Sincerely, Jim MorganNHGOP Finance Chair | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Republican Party of New Hampshire 10 Water Street Concord New Hampshire 03301

subject: Show our strength

body:
Hi --
I'll keep this short -- we're coming up on our final end-of-quarter deadline before Election Day, and when our next finance report becomes public, everyone will be looking at how committed we are to winning in 2018.
I'm working hard for you in the U.S. Senate, but I can't do it without your help.
We are standing up for our democracy, for our values, and most of all, for the people of this country. In just a few short weeks the American people will have the chance to stand up too with their votes.
**Will you help us show our strength by making a contribution so we can reach our $75,000 end-of-quarter goal?**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Gosar=204=20Congress=20Team?=
subject: Tired of Winning? Me Neither
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paul Gosar for Congress
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/9fc7f70de9ff/tired-of-winning-me-neither-527177?e=7ca82c1e3d)
---
| |
---
| |

Friends, During this election cycle the liberal left has gone to great lengths to destroy me, Judge Kavanaugh and President Trump. What they really want is to destroy the majority that the Republicans have in the House, the Senate and to stop a constitutional conservative from being on the Supreme Court. We are __**winning** __and they know it. [**_It's up to us to stop them_**.](https://gosar4congress.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d959b13e61e10f809478ff16&id=fa080d7423&e=7ca82c1e3d) Now is the time. The Conservative majority is in danger. The Left is assuming good people like you and me won't vote this time and we won't get involved. Let's surprise them again, **_like we did in 2016._** I run a lean operation. But I need money to get the word out to my people to make sure they vote for me and other conservatives running. [__**I need your help today.** __](https://gosar4congress.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d959b13e61e10f809478ff16&id=f4567a4086&e=7ca82c1e3d) Early ballots come out soon. I need your help right now in order to fight back. With your contribution my campaign can keep our field team out on the ground knocking on doors, placing yard signs, and pushing for Republicans to turn out at the polls in November. You can help me reach new voters. Every time you contribute to my campaign our conservative voice becomes louder and louder! You can mail me a donation, **_or go straight to my website and donate online_** : [http://drpaulgosar.com/](https://gosar4congress.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d959b13e61e10f809478ff16&id=525b233cd3&e=7ca82c1e3d)
Thank you for standing with me. **_Let's keep the winning team on the field. _** Sincerely, Dr. Paul Gosar

P.S. **__I love hearing from you__**. When you go to my website you can also leave a comment, like Ron. G who said "Rep. Gosar is by far the best representative I’ve ever had" or Holly M. from Prescott Valley who writes: "Thank you for standing with our President, with our Second Amendment rights, your support of the Wall, and for believing and supporting this great country. Since your siblings have chosen to take the liberal, socialist form of government, let me invite you to be my brother. You are always welcome in my family and you will have my vote for every office you ever run for. God Bless You."
#

---
|
---
| Dr. Paul Gosar
Member of Congress
Arizona's 4th District

What they really want is to destroy the majority that the Republicans have in the House, the Senate and to stop a constitutional conservative from being on the Supreme Court. We are winning and they know it. Now is the time. The Conservative majority is in danger. The Left is assuming good people like you and me won't vote this time and we won't get involved. Let's surprise them again, like we did in 2016. I run a lean operation. But I need money to get the word out to my people to make sure they vote for me and other conservatives running. Early ballots come out soon. I need your help right now in order to fight back. With your contribution my campaign can keep our field team out on the ground knocking on doors, placing yard signs, and pushing for Republicans to turn out at the polls in November. You can help me reach new voters. Every time you contribute to my campaign our conservative voice becomes louder and louder! You can mail me a donation, or go straight to my website and donate online : Thank you for standing with me. Let's keep the winning team on the field. Sincerely, Dr. Paul Gosar P.S. Team:

We _cannot_ stop fighting. Not when the Trump administration decided to pass a massive tax break for the wealthiest 1%, not when Senate Republicans are coming after protections for people with pre-existing conditions and not when far-right special interests sold out the middle class.

Every time Republicans in Washington have decided to put working families last, I have fought with both fists up to put those families first. Now, with 39 days until Election Day, I need your help to keep fighting. To really put a stop to the GOP's almost unchecked power we need to elect a Democratic Senate majority, and we can't expect to do that if I lose.

If Republicans hold on to the majority, we can expect them to continue their assault on protections for people with pre-existing conditions, continue to pass tax laws that make it harder for families to get ahead and even follow through on their threats to decimate Medicaid and Medicare. We can't let that happen.

I've been a firewall against the Trump administration's most dangerous and divisive pieces of legislation, but I can't keep fighting without your help. **Will you join me in this fight today by making a donation to my campaign before the end-of-quarter deadline this weekend -- there 's too much at risk to lose this year.**

Thanks,

Bob

from "Toss-Up" to "Tilt-Democratic"**

Friends,

On Election Day, voters won't just be choosing between Mayor Andrew Gillum and Ron DeSantis -- they'll be choosing between two very different visions for the state of Florida.

Mayor Gillum believes in a state where everyday people have access to affordable healthcare, great public schools, and a clean, healthy environment -- while Ron DeSantis believes in Donald Trump and corporate special interests.

**[But this newest rating change shows that Floridians are ready for a leader who will move our state forward. Will you chip in $5 to help us keep the momentum going?](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36cc/9e00690/5f33126f/240123fa/2159107901/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-ratings-change-tiltd?gpsid=13_55_4045&refcode=em18_180928_RateRR_fnd_gq_act__BD_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180928_RateRR_fnd_gq_act__BD_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=11+-+But+this+newest+rating+change+shows+that")**

This race is one of the most competitive -- and most watched -- in the country. But we know that polls and projections don't win races -- people do.

So, while Ron DeSantis may have chosen to run a divisive and toxic campaign straight out of Trump's playbook, we're running one based on hope, aspiration, and inspiration. And we have less than 40 days to make sure every voter knows that Mayor Gillum is the only candidate who will put everyday Floridians first.

**[So, please chip in $5 now to help get out the vote so Mayor Andrew Gillum can bring it home this November.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36cc/9e00690/5f33126f/240123fd/2159107901/VEsHBw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-ratings-change-tiltd?gpsid=13_55_4045&refcode=em18_180928_RateRR_fnd_gq_act__BD_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180928_RateRR_fnd_gq_act__BD_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=12+-+So+please+chip+in++ask++now+to+help+get+")**

clean_body: \-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- "" BREAKING:Inside Elections moves Florida Governor's race from "Toss-Up" to "Tilt-Democratic" "+" "" Friends, On Election Day, voters won't just be choosing between Mayor Andrew Gillum and Ron DeSantis -- they'll be choosing between two very different visions for the state of Florida. Mayor Gillum believes in a state where everyday people have access to affordable healthcare, great public schools, and a clean, healthy environment -- while Ron DeSantis believes in Donald Trump and corporate special interests. "" This race is one of the most competitive -- and most watched -- in the country. But we know that polls and projections don't win races -- people do. So, while Ron DeSantis may have chosen to run a divisive and toxic campaign straight out of Trump's playbook, we're running one based on hope, aspiration, and inspiration. And we have less than 40 days to make sure every voter knows that Mayor Gillum is the only candidate who will put everyday Floridians first. "+" Thank you, Brandon Davis Campaign Manager Andrew Gillum for Governor "" Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor. Andrew Gillum for Governor 240 N. Magnolia Drive Tallahassee, FL 32301

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Right now, we are in a uniquely trying moment in history.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
In less than six weeks, we all have the chance to stand up and say something about what we believe - the chance to say we do love our neighbors, and we will support one another, and we are not going t
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek:

I want to thank you for being one of my most dedicated supporters over the years. You've been with me for the long haul.

Right now, we are in a uniquely trying moment in history. We have a leader taking us in the wrong direction, we're fighting battles we thought were long over, and we feel deeply divided in so many of our core convictions. But I believe, more than anything, that what ties us together is stronger than what drives us apart. I know that at the end of the day, no matter their political ideology, people in this Commonwealth all want a safe home for their families, a fair shot at a good life, and leaders they can trust.

And I am committed to fighting for those simple things for each and every Virginian. Because you know what? If you're a Virginian, you are my neighbor. And if you're my neighbor, my faith teaches me to love you as myself. And that's true whether you're a Democrat or a Republican - I'm not let off the hook just because you didn't vote for me!

In less than six weeks, we all have the chance to stand up and say something about what we believe - the chance to say we do love our neighbors, and we will support one another, and we are not going to go backwards.

**Between now and then, I'm going to do everything I can to spread my message of unity in the face of divisiveness - and positivity in the face of nastiness - to every voter. But I'm going to need your help to do it. My campaign is only $30,000 away from our final quarterly fundraising goal of $100,000, and we have two days left to raise it. Will you make an online contribution right now to support our effort? Follow this link:**

[https://secure.timkaine.com/Final-Quarterly-Public-Deadline](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f105c/3e0906/71ff27d2/3e3648ad/2453135535/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180928_2_FR_TK_TK-EOQ&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+httpssecuretimkainecomFinalQuarterlyPubl&utm_campaign=20180928_2_FR_TK_TK-EOQ&source=20180928_2_FR_TK_TK-EOQ")

I'm grateful to have you with me and thankful for your support.

_Tim_ | [**DONATE**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f105c/3e0906/71ff27d2/3e3648ac/2453135535/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180928_2_FR_TK_TK-EOQ&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20180928_2_FR_TK_TK-EOQ&source=20180928_2_FR_TK_TK-EOQ")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: He’s voting against Kavanaugh…
body:
This week, the ultimate in Democrat obstruction has been on full display in the U.S. Senate. That's because when Democrats realized that they... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us11.campaign-archive.com/?e=1acd9bb3d6&u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f79ec9e2dc)
---
| |
---
|
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b6312f06db&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
|
---
| **_Donnelly's Voting Against Kavanaugh..._** This week, the ultimate in Democrat obstruction has been on full display in the U.S. Senate.

That's because when Democrats realized that they couldn't take out Judge Brett Kavanaugh on his merits, they created a media circus around uncorroborated allegations. They've attempted to destroy him. Judge Kavanaugh has consistently and decisively denied these allegations. And, while Democrats have voiced their outrage, Judge Kavanaugh hasn’t backed down.

Then today, to top it off, we got even more proof that Joe Donnelly isn’t a moderate. He doesn’t stand with President Donald Trump. And he doesn’t stand with Hoosiers.

He's simply just another Democrat, plain and simple, who is standing against the confirmation of Judge Kavanaugh. Today, Democrat Donnelly said he plans to vote no.

Democrat Joe Donnelly will always answer the call from Chuck Schumer, Nancy Pelosi and his fellow Democrats when they need him to stand in the way of real progress in our nation’s capital. It's obstruction at its very worst -- and it's wrong.

Democrat Donnelly may plan to vote against Judge Kavanaugh, but he should also be prepared for the wave of Hoosiers who now plan to vote against him in November.

-Kyle Hupfer

P.S. This week, we announced some big news: Vice President Mike Pence is coming back home again and [will be the keynote speaker at the 2018 Indiana Republican Party Fall Dinner](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8ff3b1868f&e=1acd9bb3d6) on October 12.

It’s just weeks ahead of the election, and will be a HUGE event as we rally the troops for Mike Braun and our 2018 statewide team. Tickets are going quickly, [so make sure you reserve your seat now](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=bf9c67d431&e=1acd9bb3d6).
---
| |
---
| | **_Governor Holcomb's Week That Was_**
---
|
---
---
| **_Steve Forbes Highlights Indiana Agriculture & Technology!_**
This week, Governor Eric Holcomb welcomed the folks from Forbes magazine – including its editor-in-chief, Steve Forbes – to Indiana as it held its [Forbes AgTech Summit in Indianapolis](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=22a1be0218&e=1acd9bb3d6) for the first time ever!

The event, which brings together people from all aspects of agriculture and technology, talked about the industry’s latest advancements, and how Indiana is at a center of it all. Even former Governor (and current Purdue University president) Mitch Daniels joined in on the fun!

As Indiana is poised to make a major investment into affordable, high-speed broadband statewide (and especially in rural areas), there’s a lot to be excited about for the future of agtech in Indiana!
---
|
---
| | **_The Mike Braun Corner_**
---
|
---
| **_Braun's Solutions vs. Donnelly's Problems_**
It's been a busy week for Mike Braun! In addition to receiving endorsements from [the NRA](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d2984dc6df&e=1acd9bb3d6) and [the U.S. Chamber of Commerce](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3c8cccf568&e=1acd9bb3d6), Mike Braun is on his Solutions Tour, meeting with the Hoosiers who are behind real solutions, and not Washington problems.

He stopped by the [Subaru of Indiana Automotive assembly facility in Lafayette](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7d92ad8261&e=1acd9bb3d6), where Hoosiers are producing the Subaru Legacy, Subaru Outback and Subaru Impreza for distribution around the world! This global company has a world of choices on where it operates, and it chooses to have its only U.S. assembly facility located right here in Indiana!

Contrast that against the Washington, D.C. problems that plagued Democrat Joe Donnelly's week. Today, Democrat Joe Donnelly announced that he’s siding with his Democrat boss Chuck Schumer – and against Hoosiers -- in an attempt to obstruct the confirmation of Judge Brett Kavanaugh to the U.S. Supreme Court.

Here's what Mike Braun had to say about that today:

_“This entire process has been an embarrassment to our democracy as Hoosiers watched firsthand how Senator Donnelly’s liberal colleagues used uncorroborated allegations to create a media circus designed to smear and destroy Judge Kavanaugh’s reputation. Donnelly’s decision to oppose President Trump’s highly qualified nominee is a grave mistake, but proves he is more concerned with standing with his liberal Democrat leaders than standing for Hoosiers. I continue to strongly support Judge Kavanaugh’s confirmation to the Supreme Court.” - **Mike Braun**_
---
|
---
| | **_Indiana Fact of the Week_**
---
|
---
| _**More****Hoosiers**** Working Than Ever Before!**_
We all know that Indiana's economy is booming! But did you know that we currently have more Hoosiers working in Indiana than ever before in the state's history?

That's right: There are currently 2,706,600 Hoosiers working in Indiana's private sector today, which is an increase of 27,600 Hoosiers just over the last year.

Indiana's on the right track, with our Republican leaders delivering strong results for Hoosiers!
---
|
---
|
---
| **_Meet Zaki Ali: It's Time For Positive Change!_**
Congratulations to Zaki Ali, our Republican nominee in District 25 for Indiana Senate, which includes sections of Delaware and Madison counties! The Anderson native has just been named to the Republican State Leadership Committee’s 18 in ’18: Races to Watch list! He's taking on Indiana Senate Minority Leader Tim Lanane, and honors like this are a sign of big momentum!

Keep up to date with Zaki Ali's campaign by following along on Facebook [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d2313ad35a&e=1acd9bb3d6)!
---
|
---
| | **_2018 Indiana Republican Party Fall Dinner_**
---
|
---
| **_Vice President Mike Pence to Headline Fall Dinner!_** It's been a big week of news! In case you missed it, last Saturday we announced that Vice President Mike Pence will be the featured guest at the 2018 Indiana Republican Party Fall Dinner. Please join Governor Eric Holcomb and U.S. Senate Candidate Mike Braun for the big event as we welcome Vice President Pence back home!

You're not going to want to miss this. Tickets are already selling quickly, but you can [click here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8401c77a58&e=1acd9bb3d6) to reserve your spot right now!
---

clean_body: This week, the ultimate in Democrat obstruction has been on full display in the U.S. Senate. That's because when Democrats realized that they... | | | | | | | | | | Donnelly's Voting Against Kavanaugh... This week, the ultimate in Democrat obstruction has been on full display in the U.S. Senate. That's because when Democrats realized that they couldn't take out Judge Brett Kavanaugh on his merits, they created a media circus around uncorroborated allegations. They've attempted to destroy him. Judge Kavanaugh has consistently and decisively denied these allegations. And, while Democrats have voiced their outrage, Judge Kavanaugh hasn’t backed down. Then today, to top it off, we got even more proof that Joe Donnelly isn’t a moderate. He doesn’t stand with President Donald Trump. And he doesn’t stand with Hoosiers. He's simply just another Democrat, plain and simple, who is standing against the confirmation of Judge Kavanaugh. Today, Democrat Donnelly said he plans to vote no. Democrat Joe Donnelly will always answer the call from Chuck Schumer, Nancy Pelosi and his fellow Democrats when they need him to stand in the way of real progress in our nation’s capital. It's obstruction at its very worst -- and it's wrong. Democrat Donnelly may plan to vote against Judge Kavanaugh, but he should also be prepared for the wave of Hoosiers who now plan to vote against him in November. -Kyle Hupfer P.S. This week, we announced some big news: Vice President Mike Pence is coming back home again and on October 12. It’s just weeks ahead of the election, and will be a HUGE event as we rally the troops for Mike Braun and our 2018 statewide team. Tickets are going quickly, . | | | | Governor Holcomb's Week That Was | | Steve Forbes Highlights Indiana Agriculture & Technology! This week, Governor Eric Holcomb welcomed the folks from Forbes magazine – including its editor-in-chief, Steve Forbes – to Indiana as it held its for the first time ever! The event, which brings together people from all aspects of agriculture and technology, talked about the industry’s latest advancements, and how Indiana is at a center of it all. Even former Governor (and current Purdue University president) Mitch Daniels joined in on the fun! As Indiana is poised to make a major investment into affordable, high-speed broadband statewide (and especially in rural areas), there’s a lot to be excited about for the future of agtech in Indiana! | | | The Mike Braun Corner | | Braun's Solutions vs. Donnelly's Problems It's been a busy week for Mike Braun! In addition to receiving endorsements from and , Mike Braun is on his Solutions Tour, meeting with the Hoosiers who are behind real solutions, and not Washington problems. He stopped by the , where Hoosiers are producing the Subaru Legacy, Subaru Outback and Subaru Impreza for distribution around the world! This global company has a world of choices on where it operates, and it chooses to have its only U.S. assembly facility located right here in Indiana! Contrast that against the Washington, D.C. problems that plagued Democrat Joe Donnelly's week. Today, Democrat Joe Donnelly announced that he’s siding with his Democrat boss Chuck Schumer – and against Hoosiers -- in an attempt to obstruct the confirmation of Judge Brett Kavanaugh to the U.S. Supreme Court. Here's what Mike Braun had to say about that today: “This entire process has been an embarrassment to our democracy as Hoosiers watched firsthand how Senator Donnelly’s liberal colleagues used uncorroborated allegations to create a media circus designed to smear and destroy Judge Kavanaugh’s reputation. Donnelly’s decision to oppose President Trump’s highly qualified nominee is a grave mistake, but proves he is more concerned with standing with his liberal Democrat leaders than standing for Hoosiers. I continue to strongly support Judge Kavanaugh’s confirmation to the Supreme Court.” - Mike Braun | | | Indiana Fact of the Week | | MoreHoosiers Working Than Ever Before! We all know that Indiana's economy is booming! But did you know that we currently have more Hoosiers working in Indiana than ever before in the state's history? That's right: There are currently 2,706,600 Hoosiers working in Indiana's private sector today, which is an increase of 27,600 Hoosiers just over the last year. Indiana's on the right track, with our Republican leaders delivering strong results for Hoosiers! | | | Meet Zaki Ali: It's Time For Positive Change! Congratulations to Zaki Ali, our Republican nominee in District 25 for Indiana Senate, which includes sections of Delaware and Madison counties! The Anderson native has just been named to the Republican State Leadership Committee’s 18 in ’18: Races to Watch list! He's taking on Indiana Senate Minority Leader Tim Lanane, and honors like this are a sign of big momentum! Keep up to date with Zaki Ali's campaign by following along on Facebook ! | | | 2018 Indiana Republican Party Fall Dinner | | Vice President Mike Pence to Headline Fall Dinner! It's been a big week of news! In case you missed it, last Saturday we announced that Vice President Mike Pence will be the featured guest at the 2018 Indiana Republican Party Fall Dinner. Please join Governor Eric Holcomb and U.S. Senate Candidate Mike Braun for the big event as we welcome Vice President Pence back home! You're not going to want to miss this. Tickets are already selling quickly, but you can to reserve your spot right now! | "Get Your Tickets Now!" | | Upcoming Republican Events : Vermillion County Lincoln Day Dinner : Orange County Fall Dinner : Kosciusko County Republican Semi-Annual Fish Fry : Clay County BBQ & Pie Auction : Crawford County Republican Underground Lincoln Day Dinner : 2018 Indiana Republican Party Fall Dinner : Laconia Festival Booth & Parade : Wabash County Republican Fall Dinner : Harrison County GOP Fall Dinner : Annual Kosciusko County Republican Hall of Fame Dinner : Jackson County Republican Party Fall Dinner : Halloween Parade in Corydon : Allen County Bean Dinner : Henry County Republican Club Speech Contest for High School Students | | News You Can Use Governor Eric Holcomb Lt. name: Jay Inslee
subject: Washington's future hangs in the balance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
We're heading into the home stretch and I need your help.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7bfc7/2f5ea88d/7505daea/2cbc757a/1303744633/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ji-eom?utm_source=ema_2018-09-28_eom-4&refcode=ema_2018-09-28_eom-4&utm_campaign=eom-4&utm_medium=ema") Friend, Let me put it on the line:**We're six weeks out from Election Day, and the stakes have never been higher.** Up and down the ballot, _exceptional Democrats are running strong races across Washington._ They're taking on issues like health care, education, a woman's right to choose, the environment, infrastructure, expanding broadband access for rural communities, and growing opportunities for hardworking Washingtonians. But Republicans, with help from their national counterparts and dark money groups, are pumping huge amounts into our state in an effort to bring the disastrous policies of Donald Trump here. [**Friend, we must fight for our values against Republican dark money and special interest lobbyists. We must build a progressive movement that can take on the worst that they throw at us. And to do that, we need to raise $15,000 by midnight on Sunday.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7bfc7/2f5ea88d/7505daea/2cbc757a/1303744633/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ji-eom?utm_source=ema_2018-09-28_eom-4&refcode=ema_2018-09-28_eom-4&utm_campaign=eom-4&utm_medium=ema") Here in Washington, there's an extra urgency to our cause. Ballots will be mailed to every voter on October 19. We don't have the luxury of waiting to reach voters until we're closer to Election Day. Washingtonians will begin making up their minds in just three weeks about the candidates they plan to vote for. Our movement for change must take off, right here and right now. Friend,with the stakes so high, we're working hard to make sure Democrats vote in record numbers this year. Up and down the ballot, we need to send a clear signal that Washingtonians are rejecting extremist policies fostering fear, hate, and division. **And to do that, we need to make sure our progressive movement is strong.** [**Will you pitch in right now to help me build our progressive movement over the next six weeks?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7bfc7/2f5ea88d/7505daea/2cbc757a/1303744633/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ji-eom?utm_source=ema_2018-09-28_eom-4&refcode=ema_2018-09-28_eom-4&utm_campaign=eom-4&utm_medium=ema") Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [CONTRIBUTE »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7bfc7/2f5ea88d/7505daea/2cbc757a/1303744633/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ji-eom?utm_source=ema_2018-09-28_eom-4&refcode=ema_2018-09-28_eom-4&utm_campaign=eom-4&utm_medium=ema")
---

name: update@tinaforminnesota.com
subject: "Minnesota is the Center of the Midterm Universe"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:

name: =?utf-8?Q?Save_Medicare!_=28via_S=C3=A0nchez_for_Congress=29?=
subject: We need 39 donations to fight back against the GOP's latest push!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Committee to Re-Elect Linda Sanchez
body:
Congressional Republicans just voted on their plan that will slash Medicare -- all so they can extend their tax scam. [](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-linda?refcode=RTW_180928_Medicare_EM&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
Peter, we need your help:

**Congressional Republicans _just_ voted on their plan to make their tax scam permanent. And when they need money to cover it, I'm afraid they will slash Social Security and Medicare.**

Millions of senior citizens rely on Medicare for quality health coverage. The idea that we'd have them shoulder the burden of paying for more tax giveaways to the 1% is offensive and goes against the very core of our values.

**[Medicare will remain on the chopping block as long as the Republicans control Congress, so with the midterm elections now just 39 days away, Linda is doing all she can to flip the House. Can you help her hit 39 donations by TONIGHT so she can fight back against the GOP's latest attack on Medicare?](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_180918_ls_eoq?refcode=RTW_180928_Medicare_EM&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | ******[Chip in $10 immediately>>](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/150366f9/4ac3d62d/6a3bd57e/1ce28b63/1234938517/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_180918_ls_eoq?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=RTW_180928_Medicare_EM")******
---
******[Chip in $25 immediately>>](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/150366f9/4ac3d62d/6a3bd57e/1ce28b60/1234938517/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_180918_ls_eoq?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=RTW_180928_Medicare_EM")******
******[Chip in $50 immediately>>](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/150366f9/4ac3d62d/6a3bd57e/1ce28b61/1234938517/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_180918_ls_eoq?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=RTW_180928_Medicare_EM")******
******[Chip in $100 immediately>>](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/150366f9/4ac3d62d/6a3bd57e/1ce28b66/1234938517/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_180918_ls_eoq?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=RTW_180928_Medicare_EM")******
******[Chip in $250 immediately>>](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/150366f9/4ac3d62d/6a3bd57e/1ce28b67/1234938517/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_180918_ls_eoq?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=RTW_180928_Medicare_EM")******
******[Or donate another amount>>](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_180918_ls_eoq?refcode=RTW_180928_Medicare_EM&recurring=auto&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")******
We need a Congress that won't treat Americans like they're numbers on a spreadsheet -- a Congress that will strengthen the programs that millions rely on for their healthcare and retirement security.

**[Linda's working hard to make this a reality -- but she needs you with her! Chip in any amount by tonight to help flip the House >>](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_180918_ls_eoq?refcode=RTW_180928_Medicare_EM&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**

Thank you,

Sanchez for Congress
**Rep. Linda S anchez proudly serves the 38th District of California. She is the fifth-highest ranking member of Leadership as the Vice Chair of the House Democratic Caucus and is the highest-ranking Latina in Congress. As a mother, union member, and progressive, Linda will always fight for America's working families.** **[CONTRIBUTE](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-linda?refcode=RTW_180928_Medicare_EM&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: A little bit of a longer read Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | [**Our last quarterly FEC deadline is _Sunday_ at midnight. Rush in a donation now. >>**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe3d/4462dc26/79b45570/201a30e9/1212013022/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwOTI4cG0yIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180928pm2?refcode=sbe180928pm2_m_other&refcode2=3268183") Peter, We can't let what happened in 2016 happen again. Two years ago at this point, it didn't look like Ohio would go for Trump -- but it did. The results have been devastating. **Consider this a reminder that my opponent, multi-millionaire Congressman Jim Renacci, is one of President Trump 's strongest allies.** He desperately wants to prove, once again, that Ohio is a "Trump state." **We know that we are not.** We're a state full of people who are sick of politicians promising to help working families, only to turn their backs on them in favor of the 1% and special interests. That's what President Trump does every day in the White House, and it's what Congressman Jim Renacci would do in the Senate. [**Please make a contribution before Sunday 's FEC deadline so we have the resources to defeat Congressman Renacci and his special interest backers. Chip in $5, $10, or match our $26 average online contribution.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe3d/4462dc26/79b45570/201a30e9/1212013022/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwOTI4cG0yIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ And quarter after quarter, I'm impressed by how this grassroots team always rises to the occasion. **Sunday is our biggest FEC deadline yet.** Right now, we're short of our goal and we need to work as hard as we can to hit our mark. [**We 're inching closer to our goal, but also to our deadline. Will you make a contribution to support my re-election campaign?**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe3d/4462dc26/79b45570/201a30e9/1212013022/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwOTI4cG0yIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180928pm2?refcode=sbe180928pm2_m_other&refcode2=3268183") With gratitude,

body:
We’re just 2 days away from one of the biggest tests our campaign has faced. It's our LAST end-of-quarter fundraising deadline before election.....

Friend, we’re just 2 days away from one of the biggest tests our campaign has faced. It's our LAST end of quarter fundraising deadline before election day.

And let me tell you why that's important.

If we don't meet our goals this month, everyone will know we're falling behind Tammy Baldwin.

And friend, we can’t let that happen! We need to make sure we come out strong and show everyone the incredible support we have for taking proven, effective leadership to DC.

I'm setting a goal of raising $50,000 before midnight on September 30th. [**Will you chip in now?**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c99e1e3936564efaa27ff97d3af94b87&_e=HgvgZ1bJYEZXSiCA3DSiV42znVJcVnLwrBFv0MLtzTjcw--UG64dIxnedCCPuil-R2cOm6kix4OtZ4NdBkoHELfg6AQjoC0GWJH_DfDmGhzzAwnRxkRh_m2kZQC5buelQswYpiOTnYDWEZoULE8fsXkNRgVZdEASxrwT2BUjpAgt144NGeI92u6_TP_BoSgGnlhuWDmBJxtc4MGlzrXHnIQ4v6qBko2OkrxSowdTCl9M5RE9VFJj8LCk6x7sUQNrWC2kvprjTyDuC8x0LpBqX_-TQQ5B8lRuO-Agxno8GGGvoHpaRPDoYQa9s-H2coWh8nMi1SzZZzomKtsxXJylrxvotG6zQvINpm4nsV0nUnkZNakcg83inbvS_aHwZzxB-VSAF-iC8m5yLcsXbCs77PHJY_F3DbljQChbAxRCbYk%3D)

Friend, we just can't afford to fall behind now.

Wisconsin NEEDS a voice in the Senate that doesn’t come from the far left, but comes from the working class people that make our state — and our country — what it is. Someone who KNOWS the Wisconsin Way.

It's about working hard – and never giving up. It’s about leaving our kids with a world better than the one we received. It's about making sure every person has a voice in our process.

I will be that voice. Where Tammy Baldwin has abandoned our way, I will fight for it.

But it’s going to take all of us working together to reach important goals like the one I'm writing about today.

We have to raise this $50,000 to send Tammy Baldwin back to the private sector.

I hope you'll chip in now: **[https://secure.anedot.com/leah/donate/](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c99e1e3936564efaa27ff97d3af94b87&_e=HgvgZ1bJYEZXSiCA3DSiV42znVJcVnLwrBFv0MLtzTjcw--UG64dIxnedCCPuil-R2cOm6kix4OtZ4NdBkoHELfg6AQjoC0GWJH_DfDmGhzzAwnRxkRh_m2kZQC5buelQswYpiOTnYDWEZoULE8fsXkNRgVZdEASxrwT2BUjpAgt144NGeI92u6_TP_BoSgGUPzZv7xJk0Tptzn7YafOG_xZTsuy_dN1uJkJgx_3dpzVVdibLfy7Na2xjjj9VoyptT0bBC46YOOjtSRaSp8b_OV2MlQav3qxI77CTa3Va30yhRx79_TxcnaUhoEGF1EQlXX4pZIq6ekqc8zvPITB48N61HN5foA_yOnigNhHlJ2MEpn3Kg3VKbc3RWUzsMHpcjwmtEHp8xEVklztWe_XUANPlu1EWk45h7UJanivt58%3D)**

Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c99e1e3936564efaa27ff97d3af94b87&_e=HgvgZ1bJYEZXSiCA3DSiVwyIEp_OxgoZvmJ8WxuvNRDxu-9vTYY5bk9IFV8CEMmQpdRYDxIsYqae4nX-sGbYHlDfbHH3KlQqaFYc5E3Td4nKb60_MoLRRdwAHZaPWnDWoiC4YM-PvtQKbCn5kjmWBCY9mrRwPOFaBzLcdYWv0gOahEwRtwUM4DTzsfDnbfCWupQdVoQwTyqugZpDYos_zocAXD_imFel8xGoga10Z1mpbcTHksSfZPodUbAtCUTqlv_cHhp-ufADSJa8uCb-GBdbNjzIElrRiy7tEa_fK22orzqBDs0OSFANw3DOVCa5IobmMyRL-AQg6Hdo_c1cj04K-kgp_iRcj3BEu3vNAZtllqs9Se5aNtoytMQoKG3Q) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c99e1e3936564efaa27ff97d3af94b87&_e=HgvgZ1bJYEZXSiCA3DSiVwyIEp_OxgoZvmJ8WxuvNRBCXgWiiKmXgWFXBSDtKiA_D5Uki7FW8BRhH7sjb4cf4vtj2c_xCh8lAu5-czewneYBF2ghCvViLdxrr5YwHLNP1QCMcG9cjrddvCGfxqIuPAwU1MAiyG_2bHMKwY6ZcqT_p1DhJZnUiA55psaLWHb4UKL1e-Id-6KyGuVpFEtxYm1NBkJiVm1HTVYFy1Ym9y8elZKdzPbxU8FD9948FYVDEe0KxP2Z92Nm64-4bg9MjUaBOevFaeO8A7ceP1ke6UDldZIs6VAIbsOHz_-BdprNDJqa8L2CpWoUwosxZpeaCDHsm0RbaZ-Q0y9JbTZ3MsxbwD5zvdL9CDE5vguPqMFr) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Friend, we’re just 2 days away from one of the biggest tests our campaign has faced. It's our LAST end of quarter fundraising deadline before election day. And let me tell you why that's important. If we don't meet our goals this month, everyone will know we're falling behind Tammy Baldwin. And friend, we can’t let that happen! We need to make sure we come out strong and show everyone the incredible support we have for taking proven, effective leadership to DC. I'm setting a goal of raising $50,000 before midnight on September 30th. Friend, we just can't afford to fall behind now. Wisconsin NEEDS a voice in the Senate that doesn’t come from the far left, but comes from the working class people that make our state — and our country — what it is. Someone who KNOWS the Wisconsin Way. It's about working hard – and never giving up. It’s about leaving our kids with a world better than the one we received. name: betofortexas.com
subject: What makes us unique
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

The way we’re building this campaign together is so unique, we sometimes
take it for granted. Most Senate candidates spend at least half their time
courting the major donors, special interests and PACs that bankroll our
elections. Not Beto!

Our campaign is about showing the best of who we can be as a state and as
a country. The way we raise our money is an important part of that. 100%
of the donations that are powering our campaign come from human beings --
no PACs. That simply does not happen in U.S. politics anymore. Together,
we're proving that citizens can win campaigns again.

Tomorrow, we have our final official end-of-quarter fundraising deadline.
We set a goal of raising $5 million because we know we can win, and we
know these resources will help us run the most competitive campaign
possible in a state as big and diverse as Texas.

Can you make a donation of
$3
right now to edge us a little bit closer to that big goal? Join the people
who are powering our campaign. We’ve come so far thanks to your
contributions, and we’re now asking again for your help.

[19]Beto for Texas

Look at that thermometer. Every single donation you make helps us stay
competitive in this race. Thank you for giving so much of your time,
treasure and talents in this critical moment.

Team Beto
